Given that chronic hepatitis is a well-established risk factor for hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC), this traditional use provides a strong ethnopharmacological rationale for investigating its anti-HCC mechanisms. However, the mechanism and active ingredients of H. japonicum extract inhibiting HCC and angiogenesis remain unclear.
This study aims to comprehensively evaluate the anti-HCC angiogenesis effects of H. japonicum extract through both in vivo and in vitro experiments, and to preliminarily investigate its underlying molecular mechanisms and target proteins.
In vivo therapeutic efficacy of H. japonicum extract was validated in zebrafish. Network pharmacology, molecular docking and surface plasmon resonance (SPR) approaches were employed to predict potential targets and signaling pathways. In vitro, EA.hy926 cells were treated with conditioned medium (CM) derived from H. japonicum extract-exposed HepG2 cells to assess migration and tube formation capabilities. VEGF content in the CM was also detected. Effect of bioactive compound Quercetin-7-O-α-L-rhamnoside (Q7R) on coagulation factor VIIa (FVIIa) cellular localization was determined by immunofluorescence, while key signaling proteins were analyzed by Western blot.
In vivo zebrafish assay revealed that H. japonicum extract at 25 μg/mL suppressed embryonic intersegmental angiogenesis by 49.41%, demonstrating its potent anti-angiogenic activity. To elucidate the underlying mechanisms, we integrated UPLC-HRMS-based phytochemical profiling with network pharmacology, which identified tissue factor (TF) as a candidate target. Molecular docking further supported this finding by showing strong binding affinity between the bioactive constituents of H. japonicum and the TF/FVIIa complex. Functionally, conditioned medium from H. japonicum-treated HepG2 cells significantly impaired EA.hy926 endothelial cell migration and tube formation, concomitant with a marked reduction in VEGF levels. Notably, treatment with 10 μM Q7R, a flavonoid component of H. japonicum, attenuated FVIIa-stimulated VEGF hypersecretion in HepG2 cells by 52.2%. Mechanistic dissection revealed that Q7R acts through the TF/FVIIa/PAR2 axis to curb aberrant downstream PI3K-AKT and ERK signaling, thereby curtailing VEGF production and secretion, which in turn suppresses endothelial cell migration and tubulogenesis.
H. japonicum and its bioactive compound Q7R inhibit HCC angiogenesis by targeting the TF/FVIIa-mediated pathway and downstream PI3K/AKT and MAPK signaling, reducing VEGF expression. These findings reveal a novel mechanism of action for H. japonicum and support its potential as an anti-angiogenic agent for HCC therapy.
papers.title_ko: Hypericum japonicum Thunb. ex Murray의 TF/FVIIa 매개 신호경로를 통한 간세포암 혈관신생 억제

summary.question: H. japonicum 추출물과 주요 성분이 간세포암의 혈관신생을 억제하는지와 그 기전을 규명하는 것이었다.
summary.methods: 제브라피시 in vivo 실험과 HepG2-EA.hy926 in vitro 공배양계에서 혈관신생, 이동, 관상형성 및 VEGF를 평가하고, 네트워크 약리학·분자도킹·SPR·Western blot으로 기전을 분석했다.
summary.results: H. japonicum 추출물과 Quercetin-7-O-α-L-rhamnoside는 TF/FVIIa/PAR2 축과 하위 PI3K-AKT 및 ERK 신호를 억제하면서 VEGF를 감소시켜 혈관신생을 줄였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 H. japonicum이 간세포암의 혈관신생 표적 후보가 될 수 있음을 시사하지만, 전임상 결과이므로 임상적 유효성과 안전성은 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 제브라피시와 세포 실험 중심의 전임상 연구로, 사람 대상 효능과 안전성을 직접 보여주지 못했다.

pico.p: 간세포암 관련 혈관신생 모델
pico.o: 혈관신생, 세포 이동 및 관상형성, VEGF 발현

papers.title: Identification of anti-fibrotic components of Bofutsushosan under conditions of age-associated obesity in mice.
papers.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
papers.authors: Onishi A, Onodera T, Sugaya S, Matsushita T, Komorisono M, Shin J et al.
papers.abstract:
Bofutsushosan (BTS) is a traditional herbal medicine used to reduce body weight, edema, and constipation. Aged individuals often present pro-fibrotic comorbidities such as metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH), chronic kidney disease, and heart failure with preserved ejection fraction. Although the weight-reducing effect of BTS is well recognized, its effects under aged conditions remain uncharacterized.
To characterize the anti-fibrotic effects of BTS under age-associated obesity and identify the components responsible.
An aged diet-induced obese mouse model combined with an in vitro TGFβ-induced fibrosis model in 3T3-L1 preadipocytes, followed by component-resolved screening and reformulation of BTS.
63-week-old mice were fed a high-fat diet containing 2% BTS for 2 months, and tissues were analyzed by histology and qPCR. In 3T3-L1 preadipocytes, pro-fibrotic gene expression and SMAD2/3 phosphorylation were assessed following treatment with whole BTS, single-component-depleted BTS, or individual components.
BTS reduced body weight by 14.8% with decreased food intake, reduced adipose tissue size, and ameliorated hepatic steatosis. Pro-fibrotic genes were reduced in adipose tissue and liver, including 60.6% and 46.2% reductions of Col1a1. BTS suppressed TGFβ-mediated pro-fibrotic gene expression and SMAD2/3 phosphorylation in 3T3-L1 preadipocytes. Among the 18 components, Sal Mirabilis was the primary pro-fibrotic constituent, whereas Forsythiae Fructus, Zingiberis Rhizoma, Rhei Rhizoma, and Scutellariae Radix were anti-fibrotic. A modified formula lacking Sal Mirabilis and supplemented with these four ingredients exerted a stronger anti-fibrotic effect.
BTS exerts anti-fibrotic effects under age-associated obesity, and its therapeutic potential can be enhanced by removing pro-fibrotic and increasing anti-fibrotic components.
papers.title_ko: 고령성 비만 마우스에서 방풍통성산의 항섬유화 성분 규명

summary.question: 고령 관련 비만 조건에서 방풍통성산의 항섬유화 효과와 그에 관여하는 성분이 무엇인지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 고령 식이유도 비만 마우스와 TGFβ 유도 섬유화 3T3-L1 전지방세포 모델에서 방풍통성산 전체 처방, 성분 제거 처방, 단일 성분을 비교한 실험 연구이다.
summary.results: 방풍통성산은 체중, 지방조직 크기, 간 지방증과 섬유화 관련 유전자 발현을 감소시켰고, Sal Mirabilis는 친섬유화 성분이었으며 네 가지 약재를 포함한 수정 처방이 더 강한 항섬유화 효과를 보였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 고령성 비만과 관련된 섬유화 맥락에서 방풍통성산의 항섬유화 가능성을 시사하지만, 성분 구성에 따라 효과가 달라질 수 있어 근거 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 마우스와 세포실험 기반의 전임상 연구이므로 임상적 유효성과 안전성을 직접 결론내릴 수 없다.

pico.p: 고령 식이유도 비만 마우스와 TGFβ 유도 섬유화 3T3-L1 전지방세포
pico.o: 체중, 지방조직 및 간 지방증, 섬유화 관련 유전자 발현과 SMAD2/3 인산화

papers.title: Press-needle therapy combined with sensory integration training in children with mild to moderate Tic disorders: A randomized controlled trial.
papers.authors: Ge SN, Hu WL, Wang CL, Xie HY, Wu T
papers.abstract:
This study aimed to evaluate the efficacy and safety of press-needle therapy (PNT) with sensory integration training (SIT) compared to SIT alone or standard pharmacological treatment with tiapride hydrochloride in children with mild to moderate tic disorders (TD).
A prospective, three-arm, randomized controlled trial was conducted with 162 children aged 6 to 12 years meeting DSM-5 criteria for persistent TD (mild to moderate severity). Participants were randomly assigned in a 1:1:1 ratio to one of 3 groups: Group 1 (PNT plus SIT, n = 54); Group 2 (SIT alone, n = 54); or Group 3 (oral tiapride hydrochloride, n = 54). The intervention period lasted 12 weeks with a subsequent 12-week follow-up. Primary outcomes included changes in the Yale Global Tic Severity Scale (YGTSS) total score and the traditional Chinese medicine syndrome score. Secondary outcomes comprised of clinical response rate (≥30% YGTSS reduction) and adverse events.
All 3 groups showed statistically significant improvements from baseline in both YGTSS and traditional Chinese medicine syndrome scores at weeks 6 and 12 (all P < .05). Statistically significant between-group differences were observed at week 12 and at the 12-week posttreatment follow-up (all P < .01). All 3 groups achieved high overall response rates, with no statistically significant differences among them (P > .05). Group 2 showed a slightly lower response rate (92.59%) compared to Groups 1 and 3 (both 98.15%). No adverse events occurred in Group 1. One case (1.9%) was reported in Group 2, and 5 cases (9.3%) in Group 3. The incidence of adverse events differed significantly among the groups (P < .05).
PNT combined SIT provides significant clinical benefits over SIT alone and offers tic reduction comparable to first-line pharmacological treatment, without associated side effects. These findings suggest that PNT combined SIT may serve as a safe and effective non-pharmacological alternative for managing pediatric TD.
papers.title_ko: 경피침 치료와 감각통합훈련 병행이 경증~중등도 틱장애 아동에서 효과와 안전성을 보인 무작위대조시험

summary.question: 경증~중등도 틱장애 아동에서 경피침 치료와 감각통합훈련 병행이 감각통합훈련 단독 또는 티아프리드와 비교해 효과와 안전성이 더 나은지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 6~12세 지속성 틱장애 아동 162명을 3군 무작위 배정하여 12주간 경피침+감각통합훈련, 감각통합훈련 단독, 또는 티아프리드 치료를 비교한 전향적 무작위대조시험이다.
summary.results: 세 군 모두 YGTSS와 한의 변증 점수가 유의하게 호전되었고, 12주 시점과 추적관찰에서 군 간 차이가 있었으며, 이상반응은 경피침+감각통합훈련군에서 가장 적었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 경피침과 감각통합훈련 병행이 소아 틱장애에서 비약물적 대안이 될 가능성을 시사하지만, 단일 연구 결과이므로 임상 적용 전 추가 근거가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 단일 연구의 비교시험 결과이며, 보고된 추적 기간이 제한적이라 장기 효과와 일반화 가능성에 주의가 필요하다.

pico.p: 경증~중등도 지속성 틱장애를 가진 6~12세 아동
pico.c: 감각통합훈련 단독 또는 경구 티아프리드 하이드로클로라이드
pico.o: YGTSS 총점, 한의 변증 점수, 반응률, 이상반응

papers.title: Research trends of acupuncture for cancer: A bibliometric analysis (2014-2023).
papers.authors: Bao Y, Feng Y, Shen Z, Zhou M, Liang B, Wang R
papers.abstract:
Acupuncture has been widely investigated as a complementary therapy for symptom management in patients with cancer. This study conducted a bibliometric analysis to comprehend global research trends, hotspots, scientific frontiers, and output characteristics of acupuncture for cancer (2014-2023).
Publications on the use of acupuncture for cancer from 2014 to 2023 were retrieved from the Web of Science Core Collection. CiteSpace 6.2.R4, VOSviewer 1.6.19, Scimago Graphica, and Microsoft Excel were used for bibliometric analysis. The main analyses included collaboration analyses of countries, institutions, authors, and journals, together with keyword co-occurrence, citation burst, and reference co-citation analyses.
A total of 1427 publications were retrieved. Annual publication output generally increased during the study period, particularly for clinical studies. The most studies were published in China, and Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center made the most significant contribution in this field. Furthermore, Mao had the most publications, whereas Molassiotis had the highest citation ranking. "Evidence-based Complementary and Alternative Medicine" and "Journal of Ethnopharmacology" were the most commonly and centrally referenced journals, respectively. Among the referenced studies, the article published by Hershman was the most cited and deliberated on. Common keywords included "Vasomotor symptoms," "Electroacupuncture," "Quality of life," and "Mechanism.
This bibliometric analysis maps the publication landscape, collaboration networks, and major research themes of acupuncture for cancer. Emerging work on acupuncture and cancer immunotherapy is gaining attention.
papers.title_ko: 암에 대한 침 치료 연구 동향: 계량서지학적 분석(2014–2023)

summary.question: 2014~2023년 암에 대한 침 치료 연구의 전반적 동향과 주요 연구 주제는 무엇인지 평가했다.
summary.methods: Web of Science Core Collection 자료를 대상으로 CiteSpace, VOSviewer 등을 이용해 국가·기관·저자·저널 협력과 키워드, 인용 폭주, 공인용 분석을 시행한 계량서지학적 연구이다.
summary.results: 해당 기간 출판 수는 전반적으로 증가했으며, 중국의 논문 수가 가장 많았고 암 면역치료와 침의 연계가 새로운 관심 분야로 나타났다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 암 관련 침 치료 연구는 증상 관리 중심의 근거 축적이 확대되고 있어, 최신 문헌에서는 전기침·삶의 질·혈관운동 증상 및 면역치료 연계 주제를 함께 살펴볼 필요가 있다.
summary.limitations: 계량서지학 분석이므로 임상적 유효성이나 안전성을 직접 평가한 연구는 아니다.

pico.p: 2014~2023년 Web of Science에 등재된 암 관련 침 치료 문헌
pico.o: 출판량, 협력 네트워크, 주요 연구 주제 및 인용 특성

papers.title: Association between tongue ultrasonographic characteristics, Yin-deficiency constitution, and intrinsic capacity impairment in older adults: An exploratory cross-sectional study.
papers.authors: Chen KT, Chao CL, Hsieh MT, Hsieh TJ, Lin CT, Chiang PH et al.
papers.abstract: Population aging is accompanied by a progressive decline in intrinsic capacity, yet objective measures reflecting underlying physiological changes remain limited. Yin-deficiency constitution in traditional Chinese medicine has been associated with intrinsic capacity impairment, but its structural correlates remain unclear. This exploratory study investigated associations among tongue ultrasonographic characteristics, Yin-deficiency constitution, and intrinsic capacity impairment in older adults. In this exploratory cross-sectional study, community-dwelling older adults attending a traditional Chinese medicine outpatient clinic (n = 123; mean age 71.6 ± 4.6 years) completed the Constitution in Chinese Medicine Questionnaire-Elderly Edition. Tongue thickness and echo intensity were measured using standardized ultrasonographic protocols, and intrinsic capacity was assessed using the Integrated Care for Older People (ICOPE) framework. Higher tongue echo intensity was associated with lower tongue thickness and higher Yin-deficiency scores. In multivariable linear regression analyses, tongue thickness remained strongly associated with tongue echo intensity (β = -0.548, P < .001), whereas the association between Yin-deficiency scores and tongue echo intensity became attenuated and was no longer statistically significant after adjustment for tongue thickness (β = -0.135, P = .079). Yin-deficiency constitution was associated with cognitive impairment (odds ratio = 2.79, 95% confidence interval = 1.13-6.89, P = .026) and visual impairment (odds ratio = 3.74, 95% confidence interval = 1.57-8.96, P = .003), whereas tongue echo intensity alone was not independently associated with ICOPE-defined intrinsic capacity impairments. Thickness-adjusted sensitivity analyses showed attenuated but directionally consistent findings. Tongue echo intensity appears to reflect structural variation in tongue musculature rather than an independent constitution-specific characteristic. Yin-deficiency constitution was associated with cognitive and visual impairment, whereas tongue echo intensity was not independently associated with ICOPE-defined intrinsic capacity impairments. These findings are exploratory and require validation in larger multicenter cohorts.
papers.title_ko: 노인에서 설초음파 특성, 음허 체질, 그리고 내재적 기능 저하의 연관성: 탐색적 횡단면 연구

summary.question: 노인에서 설초음파 지표와 음허 체질, 내재적 기능 저하가 서로 연관되는지 확인하고자 했다.
summary.methods: 지역사회 거주 노인을 대상으로 한 탐색적 횡단면 연구에서 설문, 혀 초음파, ICOPE 평가를 이용해 연관성을 분석했다.
summary.results: 혀 에코 강도는 혀 두께와는 관련되었으나 조정 후 음허 점수와의 독립적 연관성은 약해졌고, 음허 체질은 인지 및 시각 장애와 연관되었지만 혀 에코 강도 자체는 내재적 기능 저하와 독립적으로 연관되지 않았다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 설초음파의 에코 강도는 체질 특이 지표라기보다 혀 근육 구조 차이를 반영할 가능성이 있어, 한의 임상에서는 체질 및 기능평가와 함께 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 단일 외래 기반의 탐색적 횡단면 연구로 인과성을 판단할 수 없고, 더 큰 다기관 코호트에서 검증이 필요하다.

pico.p: 한의 외래를 방문한 지역사회 거주 노인
pico.o: 음허 체질, 인지·시각 장애, ICOPE 정의 내재적 기능 저하

papers.title: A comparative study on the pharmacological effects of Achyranthes root against atherosclerosis in ApoE-/- mice based on the spectrum-effect relationship.
papers.authors: Zou X, Su J, Gao B, Lei S, Li X, Li B
papers.abstract:
In traditional Chinese medicine, herbal processing is used to modify the effects of herbs. Achyranthes bidentata BL (Niu Xi) is commonly used to treat atherosclerosis and cardiovascular diseases, in both raw (RC) and salted (SRC) forms. Salting is known to enhance its effects, particularly on kidney function, but the differences in anti-atherosclerosis efficacy between RC and SRC have not been studied.
A total of 491 and 501 chemical components were identified in RC and SRC, respectively, with 337 shared components. RC at a high dose (2.4 g/kg/d) was more effective against AS than the same dose of SRC over 12 weeks. Both RC and SRC increased SDF-1, SCF-1, and CXCR4 levels in the aorta of model mice compared to controls, suggesting these agents may protect the vascular endothelium through a related signaling axis. A gray relational analysis of 19 common components using UPLC-MS peak areas showed correlations (gray relational value > 0.6) with serum total cholesterol and bone marrow SDF-1 levels.
Both RC and SRC have anti-AS effects, but salt-processing does not improve this activity.
papers.title_ko: 스펙트럼-효과 관계에 기반한 ApoE-/- 마우스 죽상경화증에 대한 우슬근의 약리효과 비교 연구

summary.question: 우슬근의 생약 처리, 특히 염처리가 죽상경화증 억제 효과를 더 높이는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: ApoE-/- 마우스 죽상경화증 모델에서 생약 우슬근과 염우슬근을 비교하고, 성분 분석과 스펙트럼-효과 관계 분석으로 관련 지표를 평가하였다.
summary.results: 생우슬근 고용량은 동일 용량의 염우슬근보다 12주 동안 죽상경화증 억제에 더 효과적이었고, 두 제형 모두 대조군보다 SDF-1, SCF-1, CXCR4를 증가시켰다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 우슬근의 염처리가 죽상경화증 효능을 높인다고 단정하기는 어렵고, 본초 가공에 따른 효과 차이는 비임상 자료를 바탕으로 신중히 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 동물실험 결과이며, 죽상경화증에 대한 임상적 유효성과 기전은 이 결과만으로 확정할 수 없다.

pico.p: ApoE-/- 마우스 죽상경화증 모델
pico.c: 대조군 및 생우슬근과 염우슬근 간 비교
pico.o: 죽상경화증 억제 효과와 SDF-1, SCF-1, CXCR4 변화

papers.title: Quantitative comparison of similarities and differences in medicinal materials used by Tibetan medicine and the three traditional medicines (6th-10th Century AD).
papers.authors: Zhang J, Li R, Sanzhi Z, Xu L, Li Y, Zhang T et al.
papers.abstract:
Tibetan medicine has historically engaged in extensive exchanges with the three traditional medicines. These interactions peaked during the Tubo Dynasty (7th-9th century AD). Numerous scholars have acknowledged the close medical and cultural exchanges between Tibetan medicine and the three traditional medicines, but studies offering quantitative and objective comparative results are lacking.
This study quantitatively analyzes the above problems from the perspective of medicinal materials and discusses the general use of medicinal materials in Tibetan medicine, the three traditional medical systems, and the exchange of co-used medicinal materials among them. It provides a preliminary analysis of the source composition of Tibetan medicinal materials.
Firstly, Data mining: Data were extracted from 20 classical texts on Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, Ayurveda and Arabic medicine dating from the 6th century AD to the 10th century AD. Information on medical properties, namely, medicinal taste, distribution, medicinal parts, efficacy, therapeutic use, and usage and dosage of medicinal materials, were systematically compiled to establish the datasets. Secondly, Analysis and comparison: Similarities and differences among medicinal materials used in Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine between the 6th and 10th centuries AD were analyzed using the Mann-Whitney test (a non-parametric method) and an intuitive comparison method.
The total numbers of medicinal materials in Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine were 1229, 2184, 760, and 511, respectively. The overall comparison showed that Tibetan medicine, traditional Chinese Medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine all used plants as the main source of medicinal materials, accounting for 81.2%, 84.5%, 87.3%, and 79.8%, respectively. There were significant differences in medicinal parts, therapeutic uses, and medicinal taste among them (p < 0.05). In terms of medicinal parts, traditional Chinese medicine mostly used whole herbs and rhizomes, whereas Tibetan medicine, Ayurveda, and Arabic medicine were more inclined to use renewable fruits, seeds, and leaves. Regarding treatment, although the four traditional medicines were generally used to treat digestive diseases, traditional Chinese medicine was more commonly used to treat skin diseases, whereas Ayurveda and Arabic medicine were more commonly used to treat respiratory and urogenital diseases. The comparison of co-used medicinal materials showed that Tibetan medicine had 248 kinds of co-used medicinal materials with Traditional Chinese Medicine, 140 with Ayurveda, and 128 with Arabic medicine. These co-used medicinal materials exhibited similarities and differences in terms of medicinal parts, therapeutic applications, and dose specifications.
This study found differences and similarities in the use of medicinal materials across the four traditional medicines. Significant differences in medicinal parts, therapeutic uses, and dosage forms were found, which were attributed to the combined influence of multiple factors, such as medical theory and cultural customs. In addition, a partial overlap was found between the medicinal materials used in Tibetan medicine and the three medical systems. This finding indicates that although grounded in locally available resources, Tibetan medicine has incorporated medicinal material information from traditional Chinese medicine (20.18%), Ayurveda (11.19%), and Arabic medicine (10.41%). Overall, these findings provide an empirical basis for understanding similarities and differences between Tibetan medicine and the three major medical systems and offer a novel perspective for comparative research in traditional medicine.
papers.title_ko: 티베트의학과 3대 전통의학(6~10세기)에서 사용된 약재의 유사점과 차이점에 대한 정량 비교

summary.question: 티베트의학과 중국 전통의학, 아유르베다, 아랍의학의 약재 사용은 6~10세기에 어떻게 유사하고 달랐는가?
summary.methods: 6~10세기 20개 고전 문헌의 약재 정보를 수집해 데이터셋을 구축하고, Mann-Whitney 검정과 비교 분석으로 약재 특성을 정량 비교했다.
summary.results: 네 전통의학은 모두 식물성 약재를 주로 사용했으나 약재 부위, 치료 용도, 약미에서 유의한 차이가 있었고, 티베트의학은 세 의학체계와 부분적 약재 중복을 보였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 전통의학 간 약재 공유와 차이는 문헌·문화·의학 이론의 영향을 함께 반영하므로, 본초 비교 연구에서 출처와 맥락을 함께 해석하는 점이 중요하다.
summary.limitations: 문헌 기반의 후향적 비교연구로 실제 임상 사용이나 인과관계를 직접 입증하지는 못한다.

pico.p: 6~10세기 티베트의학, 중국 전통의학, 아유르베다, 아랍의학의 고전 문헌
pico.i: 티베트의학의 약재 사용과 다른 전통의학과의 비교
pico.o: 약재 원천, 약재 부위, 치료 용도, 약미 및 공통 사용 약재의 차이

papers.title: Response to the Letter to the Editor regarding "Cost-effectiveness of acupuncture needling for older adults with chronic low back pain".
papers.authors: Herman PM, Mann S, DeBar LL

papers.title: Integrative oncology in colorectal cancer: evidence-based strategies from prevention through survivorship.
papers.authors: Shen C, Lou R, Bai F, Zhang Y, Xu T, Huang Z
papers.abstract: Colorectal cancer (CRC) is a leading global malignancy, with approximately 1.9 million new cases and over 900,000 deaths recorded in 2022, yet evidence-based integrative oncology strategies remain inconsistently incorporated into routine care. This narrative review synthesizes current evidence across the full CRC care continuum, from primary prevention through long-term survivorship. High-fiber diets, Mediterranean dietary patterns, calcium supplementation, regular physical activity, healthy weight maintenance, and berberine each demonstrate reproducible CRC risk reduction in large prospective cohorts and multicenter randomized controlled trials. The CHALLENGE trial (NEJM 2025) provides the first randomized phase 3 evidence that structured exercise after adjuvant chemotherapy reduces disease recurrence (HR 0.72) and death (HR 0.63) in colon cancer. Aspirin chemoprevention requires individualized risk-benefit assessment per 2022 US Preventive Services Task Force guidelines; preliminary CaPP3 trial data (conference presentation, June 2025; not yet peer-reviewed) suggest non-inferiority of low-dose aspirin (75-100 mg/day) to 600 mg/day in Lynch syndrome, pending formal publication. Fusobacterium nucleatum promotes colorectal carcinogenesis through five mechanistically distinct pathways: FadA-mediated Wnt/β-catenin activation, Fap2- and CbpF-mediated immune evasion via TIGIT and CEACAM1, succinate-HIF-1α-EZH2-mediated immune suppression, Hippo pathway-mediated suppression of pyroptosis, and autophagy-induced chemoresistance. Perioperative multi-strain probiotics significantly reduce postoperative infectious complications, and fecal microbiota transplantation shows preliminary promise for sensitizing microsatellite-stable CRC to immunotherapy. The 2022-2024 SIO-ASCO and ASCO-SIO clinical practice guidelines endorse mindfulness-based interventions, yoga, and acupuncture for anxiety, depression, fatigue, and cancer-related pain. Systematic integration of these interventions into multidisciplinary CRC care requires standardized implementation frameworks, CRC-specific clinical trials for mind-body modalities, and bioavailability-optimized phytochemical formulations.
papers.title_ko: 대장암의 통합종양학: 예방부터 생존기까지의 근거기반 전략

summary.question: 대장암의 예방부터 생존기까지 통합종양학 전략의 근거는 무엇인지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 대장암 전주기에 대한 최신 근거를 종합한 서술적 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 고식이섬유식, 지중해식, 칼슘, 규칙적 신체활동, 체중 유지, 베르베린, 수술 전 프로바이오틱스, 마음챙김·요가·침이 일부 임상결과 개선과 연관되었다고 정리하였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 대장암에서는 식이·운동·장내미생물·마음몸중재와 침 치료가 일부 근거를 갖지만, 적용 전에는 지침과 환자별 위험-편익을 함께 고려해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 서술적 고찰이며, 일부 내용은 예비자료나 가이드라인 인용에 기반해 근거 강도가 균일하지 않다.

pico.p: 대장암 환자 및 대장암 위험군
pico.i: 식이, 운동, 보충제, 프로바이오틱스, 마음챙김, 요가, 침, 베르베린
pico.o: 재발, 사망, 발병위험, 수술 후 감염, 불안, 우울, 피로, 통증

papers.title: Integrative Management of Premenstrual Dysphoric Disorder: The Role of Traditional Chinese Medicine.
papers.authors: Xu M, Chen J
papers.abstract: Premenstrual dysphoric disorder (PMDD) is a severe form of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), affecting 3%-8% of women of reproductive age. It is characterized by emotional, behavioral, and physical symptoms during the luteal phase, primarily driven by neuroendocrine sensitivity to hormonal fluctuations and dysregulation of central neurotransmitter systems. Genetic predisposition and environmental stressors contribute to its onset. Although conventional treatments such as selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors (SSRIs) and hormonal therapies offer symptom relief, they are often accompanied by adverse effects and limited long-term efficacy. Traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) posits that the core pathogenesis of PMDD lies in the dysfunction of liver's conveyance and dispersion, which may consistent with modern biological research evidence. TCM approaches, represented by Chinese herbal medicine and acupuncture, may alleviate symptoms of PMDD by targeting and modulating its core modern pathogenic mechanisms. With its few side effects and the unique advantage of individualized treatment based on syndrome differentiation, TCM holds the potential to become a mainstream therapeutic option for PMDD. This narrative review synthesizes evidence from clinical trials, animal and pharmacological studies to explore the efficacy and underlying mechanisms of TCM in the treatment of PMDD and compares these approaches with conventional therapies. Nonetheless, the integration of TCM into mainstream practice for PMDD is still hampered by challenges such as insufficient evidence-based medical data. Research in TCM focusing on biomarker identification, establishment of standardized treatment protocols, and refinement of efficacy evaluation systems is expected to drive its evolution into a mainstream treatment option for PMDD.
papers.title_ko: 전통중의학의 월경전 불쾌장애 통합 관리에서의 역할

summary.question: 월경전 불쾌장애에서 전통중의학이 증상 완화와 기전 조절에 도움이 되는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 월경전 불쾌장애에 대한 임상시험, 동물연구, 약리연구를 종합한 서술적 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 전통중의학의 한약과 침은 월경전 불쾌장애의 증상과 병태기전에 잠재적 이점이 있을 수 있다고 정리하였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 침구와 한약은 PMDD에서 보완적 선택지로 논의될 수 있으나, 근거 수준과 표준화가 부족해 신중한 해석이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 서술적 리뷰이며, 근거 기반 자료가 충분하지 않아 효과와 안전성을 확정하기 어렵다.

pico.p: 가임기 여성의 월경전 불쾌장애
pico.c: 기존의 선택적 세로토닌 재흡수 억제제와 호르몬 치료
pico.o: 증상 완화 및 관련 병태기전 조절

papers.title: Electroacupuncture alleviates neuroinflammation and promotes recovery of neurological functions after intracerebral hemorrhage by modulating α7nAChR/JAK2/STAT3 signaling pathway.
papers.authors: Xu H, Wang Y, Zi L, Chang X, Gao Y, Cao X et al.
papers.abstract:
Electroacupuncture, a therapeutic modality integrating electrical stimulation with traditional acupuncture, has emerged as a promising intervention for intracerebral hemorrhage (ICH). This study aimed to elucidate the potential mechanisms underlying electroacupuncture's therapeutic effects in a mouse model of ICH.
The mice were injected autologous blood into basal ganglia region of brain to establish an ICH model. The study comprised two parts. First, we evaluated the therapeutic efficacy of electroacupuncture at Baihui (GV20) and Dazhui (GV14) points using the ICH model by neurological deficit score, Fluoro-Jade C (FJC) staining, and ELISA. Subsequently, based on the observed therapeutic benefits, we further explored the underlying mechanisms via neurological deficit and adhesive removal score, immunofluorescence staining, immunohistochemical staining, ELISA, and Western blot assays.
The first part of the study showed that electroacupuncture treatment alleviated the expression of proinflammatory cytokines [tumor necrosis factor-alpha (TNF-α) and interleukin-1 beta (IL-1β)], neuronal degeneration, and neurological deficits. The second part of the study showed that electroacupuncture treatment upregulated the expression of the α7 nicotinic acetylcholine receptor (α7nAChR), downregulated Janus kinase-2 (JAK2) and signal transducer and activator of transcription 3 (STAT3) phosphorylation, promoted M2 microglia/macrophage polarization, and reduced IL-1β and TNF-α expression, contributing to improved neurobehavioral function.
Electroacupuncture treatment can alleviate neuroinflammation and improve neurobehavioral function in ICH mice, which might be modulated by the α7nAChR/JAK2/STAT3 pathway, providing a new molecular mechanism of electroacupuncture treatment on ICH.
papers.title_ko: 전침은 α7nAChR/JAK2/STAT3 신호경로를 조절해 뇌내출혈 후 신경염증을 완화하고 신경기능 회복을 촉진한다

summary.question: 전침이 뇌내출혈 후 신경염증과 신경학적 기능 회복에 도움이 되는지와 그 기전을 확인하고자 했다.
summary.methods: 자가혈 주입으로 만든 생쥐 뇌내출혈 모델에서 백회(GV20)와 대추(GV14) 전침의 효과를 신경결손 점수, 염색, ELISA, 면역염색 및 Western blot으로 평가했다.
summary.results: 전침은 TNF-α와 IL-1β를 낮추고 신경변성과 신경결손을 완화했으며, α7nAChR를 증가시키고 JAK2/STAT3 인산화를 억제하며 M2 미세아교세포/대식세포 분화를 촉진했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 전침이 뇌내출혈의 신경염증과 신경행동 이상에 관여할 가능성을 시사하지만, 동물실험 결과이므로 임상 적용은 추가 근거가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 생쥐 모델의 전임상 연구로, 사람 대상의 임상적 유효성과 안전성은 직접 확인되지 않았다.

pico.p: 자가혈로 유발한 생쥐 뇌내출혈 모델
pico.o: 신경염증, 신경학적 결손, 신경행동 기능 및 관련 염증표지자

papers.title: Comparative effects of low-level laser acupuncture and dry needling on clinical and functional outcomes in patients with chronic cervical myofascial pain syndrome: a randomized controlled trial.
papers.authors: Zaidi F, Ahmed U, Ahmad A, Shabbir M, Ahmed I
papers.abstract: The purpose of this study was to compare the effectiveness of Low-Level Laser Acupuncture with Dry Needling along with Routine Physical Therapy on clinical and functional outcomes in patients with Chronic Cervical Myofascial Pain Syndrome. An Assessor-blind Randomized Controlled trial was conducted at the Physical Therapy department of Rawal General & Dental Hospital, Pakistan. The study duration was June 2023 to November 2024. A non-probability convenience sampling technique was employed to produce a study sample of 100 individuals with Chronic Cervical Myofascial Pain Syndrome. The 100 eligible participants, with a mean age of 34 ± 7.21 years, were randomly allocated into two equal groups (n = 50 per group). Group A received Low-Level Laser Acupuncture and Routine Physical Therapy, while Group B underwent Dry Needling and Routine Physical Therapy. The outcomes of the study were pain intensity, neck disability, cervical range of motion, and health-related quality of life measured by the Numeric Pain Rating Scale, Neck Disability Index, Goniometer, and SF-36 health survey questionnaire, respectively. The outcome measures were evaluated at three temporal points: the pre, mid, and post-treatment sessions. Each participant received a total of 18 treatment sessions. The IBM SPSS Statistics version 26.0 was used to analyze and interpret the results. The Mann-Whitney U test, Friedman test, and subsequent Wilcoxon signed-rank post hoc analyses with Bonferroni adjustment demonstrated statistically significant differences (p < 0.05 in all cases), both intergroup and intragroup over time. The Low-Level Laser Acupuncture and Dry Needling both proved to be efficient adjunct therapies to routine physical therapy for Chronic Cervical Myofascial Pain Syndrome for different durations of improvement.
papers.title_ko: 만성 경부 근막통증증후군 환자에서 저준위 레이저 침과 건침의 임상 및 기능적 결과 비교: 무작위 대조시험

summary.question: 만성 경부 근막통증증후군에서 저준위 레이저 침과 건침 중 어느 것이 일상 물리치료에 병행 시 임상·기능 지표 개선에 더 유리한지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 평가자 눈가림 무작위 대조시험으로, 만성 경부 근막통증증후군 환자를 두 군으로 나누어 저준위 레이저 침 또는 건침을 일상 물리치료와 함께 시행하고 치료 전·중·후를 비교했다.
summary.results: 두 중재 모두 통증, 목 장애, 경추 가동범위, 삶의 질에서 유의한 개선을 보였고, 개선 지속 기간은 두 군에서 다르게 나타났다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 저준위 레이저 침과 건침은 만성 경부 근막통증증후군에서 일상 물리치료의 보조요법으로 유의한 변화를 보였으나, 상대적 우월성은 결과 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 단일기관 연구이며 편의표집을 사용했고, 두 중재의 장기적 우월성에 대한 정보는 제한적이다.

pico.p: 만성 경부 근막통증증후군 환자
pico.i: 저준위 레이저 침 또는 건침을 일상 물리치료와 병행
pico.c: 저준위 레이저 침과 건침 간 비교
pico.o: 통증, 목 장애, 경추 가동범위, 건강관련 삶의 질

papers.title: Evaluation of non-opioid therapies for pain management of sickle cell disease: a literature-based review.
papers.authors: Riley K, Neba R, Atanda A
papers.abstract: Pain is a debilitating complication of sickle cell disease (SCD), driven by recurrent vaso-occlusive crises and chronic pain syndromes involving central sensitization and neuropathic mechanisms. Although opioid medications remain first-line therapy for acute pain, there are limitations that highlight the need for effective adjunctive approaches. Available data support non-opioid pharmacologic therapies including acetaminophen and nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs as components of multimodal analgesia, with emerging evidence for therapies targeting neuropathic and centralized pain. Non-pharmacologic interventions such as cognitive behavioral therapy have also demonstrated potential benefits as adjunctive strategies in SCD pain management. This literature review examines evidence supporting non-opioid pharmacologic and non-pharmacologic therapies for pain management in SCD and is based on structured searches of PubMed, MEDLINE, and Cochrane databases.
papers.title_ko: 겸상적혈구질환 통증 관리에서 비오피오이드 치료의 평가: 문헌 기반 고찰

summary.question: 겸상적혈구질환 통증 관리에 도움이 되는 비오피오이드 치료의 근거를 평가하는 것이었다.
summary.methods: PubMed, MEDLINE, Cochrane를 구조적으로 검색한 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 아세트아미노펜과 NSAIDs는 다중양식 진통의 일부로 지지되었고, 신경병성·중추감작성 통증을 겨냥한 치료와 인지행동치료도 보조적 가능성이 제시되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 겸상적혈구질환 통증에서 비오피오이드 약물과 비약물 중재는 오피오이드의 보조적 선택지로 고려될 수 있으나, 근거의 질과 적용 가능성은 개별 문헌에 따라 다르다.
summary.limitations: 체계적 검색을 사용했지만 문헌고찰이며, 직접 비교 근거나 임상적 효과 크기에 대한 확정적 결론은 제한적이다.

pico.p: 겸상적혈구질환 환자의 통증
pico.c: 오피오이드 중심 치료 또는 명확한 정보 없음
pico.o: 통증 완화

papers.title: Antifibrotic Effects of Yi-Qi-Jian-Pi-Xiao-Yu Formula in Kidney via HIF1A-Driven M1 Macrophage Polarization.
papers.authors: Lu K, Ye L, Jiang W, Cheng T, Xia H, Zhang P et al.
papers.abstract:
A traditional Chinese medicine Yi-Qi-Jian-Pi-Xiao-Yu (YQJPXY) formula can potentially ameliorate chronic kidney disease (CKD), but its effect on renal fibrosis (RF), a prevalent pathological feature of CKD, remains unclear.
To mimic renal injury and fibrosis, a mouse unilateral ureteral obstruction (UUO) model was employed. Using hematoxylin-eosin and Masson's trichrome stains, enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay, and immunofluorescence, the effects of YQJPXY on renal injury in UUO mice were evaluated. A series of bioinformatics analyses were then conducted to explore the key genes and immune cells involved in the therapeutic mechanism of YQJPXY. Finally, in vivo and in vitro studies provided multifaceted evaluations of YQJPXY against RF from the perspectives of macrophage dynamics and roles of HIF1A.
YQJPXY treatment significantly reduced levels of TGF-β1 and IL-6, attenuated tubular damage, decreased extracellular matrix protein (FN and Col-I) expressions, and modulated fibrosis and epithelial-mesenchymal transition markers in UUO mice in a dose-dependent manner. Bioinformatics analysis identified HIF1A as the key target of YQJPXY against RF. In vivo, HIF1A deficiency lessened RF and recruitment of CD45+ CD11b+ and CD45+ F4/80+ macrophages in fibrotic kidneys. During treatment, YQJPXY inhibited HIF1A expression and reduced M1 macrophage polarization. In vitro experiments confirmed that YQJPXY suppresses hypoxia-induced M1 macrophage polarization and HK-2 cell transdifferentiation via downregulating HIF1A.
YQJPXY alleviates RF by attenuating HIF1A-mediated M1 macrophage polarization, providing a potential therapeutic approach for CKD.
papers.title_ko: 의기건비소어방의 신장 항섬유화 효과: HIF1A 매개 M1 대식세포 분화를 통해

summary.question: 의기건비소어방이 만성 신장병의 신장 섬유화를 줄일 수 있는지와 그 기전을 평가한 연구이다.
summary.methods: UUO 생쥐 모델과 세포실험, 생물정보학 분석을 병행하여 염증·섬유화 지표, 대식세포 분화, HIF1A 관련 기전을 평가했다.
summary.results: 의기건비소어방은 UUO 생쥐에서 섬유화와 조직손상을 완화했고 HIF1A 발현 및 M1 대식세포 분화를 억제했으며, HIF1A 결핍도 섬유화를 줄였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 한약 처방이 CKD 관련 신장 섬유화의 잠재적 기전 연구에 의미가 있음을 시사하지만, 임상 적용 가능성은 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 동물모델과 세포실험 중심의 전임상 연구이므로 사람 대상 효과와 안전성은 확인되지 않았다.

pico.p: UUO로 신장 섬유화를 유도한 생쥐와 HK-2 세포
pico.o: 신장 섬유화, 염증, M1 대식세포 분화, HIF1A 발현

papers.title: Natural ginger extract promotes wound healing via antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities.
papers.authors: Zhou C, Ai X, You X, Chen G, Liu Z, Tian L
papers.abstract: Wound repair has always been a hot topic in medical research, but at present, many studies focus on expensive synthetic chemical materials, and little attention is paid to green and healthy foodborne materials, which leads to the abuse and resistance of some drugs and waste of valuable medical resources. Therefore, we used a traditional Chinese medicine ginger with medicinal and edible properties for wound regeneration and repair and used a simple preparation procedure to prepare the extract, which was verified in vitro to have good cytocompatibility, biological activity, and antioxidant and angiogenetic effects. In addition, it promotes granulation tissue regeneration, collagen deposition, blood vessel growth and regulation of inflammatory factors in the body. These results indicate the potential of ginger extract (Ginger E) to accelerate wound regeneration through its good antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects and also open up a new path for the application of more foodborne materials in the development of regenerative medicine.
papers.title_ko: 천연 생강 추출물이 항산화 및 항염증 작용을 통해 상처 치유를 촉진한다

summary.question: 생강 추출물이 상처 재생과 치유를 촉진할 수 있는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 생강 추출물을 간단히 제조해 in vitro와 체내에서 세포적합성, 생물학적 활성, 항산화·혈관신생 효과 및 상처 재생 관련 지표를 평가했다.
summary.results: 생강 추출물은 좋은 세포적합성과 항산화·혈관신생 효과를 보였고 육아조직 재생, 콜라겐 침착, 혈관 성장 및 염증인자 조절과 연관되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 생강 추출물은 상처 회복을 돕는 식이성 본초 소재의 가능성을 보여주지만, 임상 적용 전 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 임상시험의 구체적 대상, 비교군, 정량 결과와 안전성 정보가 abstract에 충분히 제시되지 않았다.

pico.p: 명확한 정보 없음
pico.o: 상처 재생, 항산화, 항염증, 혈관신생 관련 지표

papers.title: Traditional Chinese Medicine in the Treatment of Ulcerative Colitis: From Pharmacokinetics to Personalized Therapy.
papers.journal: The American journal of Chinese medicine
papers.authors: Peng X, Zheng S, Tian G, Dai S, Li Y
papers.abstract: Ulcerative colitis (UC) is a chronic inflammatory bowel disease driven by immune dysregulation, intestinal microbiota imbalance, and disruption of the mucosal barrier. Current clinical management is challenged by high relapse rates and significant interindividual variability in drug responses. Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) has shown unique therapeutic advantages in UC treatment through multi-targeted interventions such as the modulation of the immune-microbiota axis, restoration of mucosal integrity, and reduction of oxidative stress. However, two major bottlenecks, the complex pharmacokinetic (PK) behaviors of multi-component systems and the lack of personalized dosing strategies, hinder the optimization of its clinical efficacy. This review emphasizes the PK underpinnings of TCM therapy for UC by integrating current knowledge on absorption, distribution, metabolism, and excretion (ADME) characteristics, both PK and pharmacodynamic (PD) and analytical modeling advances, and PK-informed strategies that facilitate individualized clinical use. By integrating PK profiling with patient-specific variables, this review aims both to provide a theoretical and methodological framework for precision TCM in UC management and to ultimately facilitate a paradigm shift from empirical therapy to quantitatively optimized interventions.
papers.title_ko: 궤양성 대장염 치료에서 전통중의학: 약동학에서 개인맞춤 치료까지

summary.question: 전통중의학이 궤양성 대장염에서 어떻게 약동학적 관점과 개인맞춤 치료로 최적화될 수 있는가를 다룬다.
summary.methods: 궤양성 대장염에서 전통중의학의 PK/PD, ADME 특성, 분석 모델 및 개인화 전략을 종합한 서술형 리뷰이다.
summary.results: 전통중의학은 면역-미생물총 축, 점막 장벽, 산화스트레스에 작용할 잠재력이 있으나 복합 성분의 PK와 개인화 용량 설정이 임상 최적화의 핵심 과제로 제시되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한약의 UC 적용은 경험적 사용보다 약동학과 환자 특성을 함께 고려한 정밀한 접근이 중요하다는 점을 시사한다.
summary.limitations: 임상효과를 직접 검증한 연구가 아니라 리뷰이며, 구체적 임상 성과나 표준화된 개인맞춤 용량 근거는 제한적이다.

pico.p: 궤양성 대장염 환자
pico.o: 약동학적 최적화와 개인맞춤 치료 가능성

papers.title: Patient Preference and Generalisability in a Trial of Cheek Acupuncture for Stress Urinary Incontinence.
papers.journal: QJM : monthly journal of the Association of Physicians
papers.authors: Kaneda Y

papers.title: East Asian herbal medicine as an adjunctive treatment for schizophrenia: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
papers.authors: Choi Y, Kim PW, Kwon CY, Kim MJ, Lee KE, Lee S et al.
papers.abstract:
Herbal medicine is widely used as an adjunctive treatment for schizophrenia, but evidence remains limited.
To evaluate the effectiveness and safety of East Asian herbal medicine combined with antipsychotics in schizophrenia spectrum disorders.
Ten sources including MEDLINE, EMBASE and CENTRAL were searched up to January 2025 for randomised controlled trials comparing East Asian herbal medicine combined with antipsychotics versus antipsychotics alone. Primary outcome was the overall symptom scores (PANSS/BPRS). Secondary outcomes included adverse events, negative and positive symptom scores, response rates, social function, quality of life, recurrence, and adherence. Risk of bias was assessed using the Cochrane RoB 2, and evidence certainty using GRADE.
270 studies comprising 26,053 participants were included. East Asian herbal medicine combined with standard-dose antipsychotics improved overall symptom (SMD - 1.38, 95% CI - 1.60 to -1.17; 181 studies, 18,569 participants; low-certainty evidence) and reduced adverse events (RR 0.56, 95% CI 0.51-0.62; 92 studies, 8983 participants; low-certainty evidence) versus antipsychotics alone. East Asian herbal medicine combined with low-dose antipsychotics versus standard-dose antipsychotics showed symptom improvement (SMD - 0.92, 95% CI - 1.54- - 0.29; 25 studies, 1907 participants; low-certainty evidence) and fewer adverse events (RR 0.44, 95% CI 0.34-0.58; 6 studies, 450 participants; low-certainty evidence).
Low-certainty evidence suggests that East Asian herbal medicine as an adjunct to antipsychotics may improve symptoms and reduce adverse events in schizophrenia. However, most studies raised concerns regarding the risk of bias, and potential publication bias was suspected. Results require cautious interpretation and further high-quality studies are needed.
papers.title_ko: 조현병에 대한 보조치료로서 동아시아 한약: 체계적 문헌고찰 및 메타분석

summary.question: 동아시아 한약을 항정신병약과 병용하면 조현병 스펙트럼 장애의 증상과 안전성에 도움이 되는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 2025년 1월까지 문헌을 검색해 항정신병약 단독과 비교한 무작위대조시험을 체계적 문헌고찰과 메타분석으로 종합했다.
summary.results: 동아시아 한약 병용은 증상 점수와 이상반응을 낮추는 결과를 보였지만, 근거의 확실성은 낮았다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 조현병에서 동아시아 한약의 보조적 가능성은 보이나, 비뚤림 위험과 출판편향 가능성이 있어 근거 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 대부분의 연구에서 비뚤림 위험이 높았고 출판편향이 의심되어 근거 확실성이 낮았다.

pico.p: 조현병 스펙트럼 장애 환자
pico.o: 전체 증상 점수, 이상반응, 음성/양성 증상, 반응률, 사회기능, 삶의 질, 재발, 순응도

papers.title: Development and validation of a disease-syndrome integrated assessment model for AECOPD severity: protocol for a nationwide multicentre cross-sectional study.
papers.authors: Zhang HL, Liu JM, Li Y, Wang LY, Jia PL, Yao ZX
papers.abstract:
Acute exacerbations of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (AECOPD) accelerate disease progression and increase mortality. Accurate severity assessment is essential for standardised clinical management. Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) shows efficacy in treating AECOPD, but no practical TCM-specific severity assessment tool exists. This study integrates multidimensional Western and TCM variables to develop an AECOPD severity assessment model, aiming to support clinical evaluation, improve treatment efficacy and prognosis and offer methodological insights for related research.
The overall study design comprises four sequential steps. First, factors influencing AECOPD severity will be preliminarily screened through literature review and the first round of expert questionnaire surveys. Second, a multicentre cross-sectional study will be performed to establish a clinical information database; multiple statistical methods, combined with a second expert questionnaire survey, will be employed to identify the relevant variables associated with disease severity. Third, based on the established clinical database and identified variables, a disease-syndrome integrated AECOPD severity assessment model will be developed using both Classification and Regression Trees and Backpropagation Neural Networks. Fourth, the models will undergo comprehensive evaluation and validation to determine an accurate, practical, reproducible and externally valid disease severity assessment tool.
The study protocol and all required documents have been submitted for review and approval to the Independent Ethics Committees of all the participating sites. All participants will provide their written informed consent on study entry, and all the recorded data will be treated as confidential. Ethical approval for this study was granted by the Institutional Review Board of the First Affiliated Hospital of Henan University of Chinese Medicine (Approval No. 2025HL-342) TRIAL REGISTRATION NUMBER: NCT06918353.
papers.title_ko: AECOPD 중증도 평가를 위한 질병-증후 통합 평가모델의 개발과 검증: 전국 다기관 횡단면 연구 프로토콜

summary.question: AECOPD 중증도를 한의학과 서양의학 변수를 통합해 정확하게 평가할 수 있는 모델을 개발할 수 있는지가 연구 질문이다.
summary.methods: 문헌고찰과 전문가 설문, 전국 다기관 횡단면 임상정보 구축, 통계분석 및 분류회귀나무와 역전파 신경망을 이용한 모델 개발·검증을 계획한 프로토콜 연구이다.
summary.results: 아직 결과가 보고되지 않은 연구 프로토콜이다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한의학 특이적 AECOPD 중증도 평가도구를 만들기 위한 방법론적 시도로, 향후 임상평가의 표준화 가능성을 시사한다.
summary.limitations: 실제 성능과 유용성은 아직 검증되지 않은 연구 계획 단계라는 점이 가장 큰 한계이다.

pico.p: AECOPD 환자
pico.i: 서양의학과 TCM 변수를 통합한 중증도 평가모델 개발
pico.o: AECOPD 중증도 평가의 정확성, 실용성, 재현성 및 외적 타당성

papers.title: Aerobic exercise interventions for older adults with cognitive frailty: a systematic review.
papers.authors: Zhou X, Chen L, Huang Z, Zhang Z, Li M, Yang Z
papers.abstract:
The purpose of this study was to systematically review the effects of aerobic exercise on cognitive function in older adults using randomized controlled trials (RCTs).
This study was a systematic review.
Ten databases, namely PubMed, the Cochrane Library, Wanfang, China National Knowledge Infrastructure (CNKI), SinoMed, Medline, Embase, the Social Science Citation Index (SSCI), Bielefeld Academic Search Engine (BASE), and OpenGrey, were searched from their inception to 30 April 2026.
The randomized controlled trials of the aerobic exercise interventions for the cognitive function of older adults were addressed.
A total of 16 studies were included in the review. The primary conclusion of the quoted studies was that they evaluated the effects of interventions on cognitive function. Many studies (68.8%) used a single-blinded design, while 6.3% used a double-blind design and 25% used an open-label design. Overall, 14 studies (87.5%) reported significant cognitive benefits. Interventions were classified as pure aerobic (n = 7), intrinsic/embedded (n = 6), simultaneous dual-task (n = 2), and sequential (n = 1) interventions. All pure aerobic and dual-task interventions improved cognition; the single sequential trial showed no cognitive gain. Intrinsic/embedded interventions consistently enhanced both cognitive and physical outcomes. Two studies (12.5%) found no overall cognitive improvement, but one reported improvements in male patients. Intensity monitoring was heterogeneous. Quality assessment indicated a low risk of bias in a majority of trials.
These findings prove that aerobic exercise benefits cognition, verbal fluency, attention, sleep quality, executive function, flanker task reaction time, and postural balance. Simultaneous dual-task aerobic exercise may yield larger executive and memory gains than lower-cognitive-load activities.
PROSPERO, CRD420251061109.
papers.title_ko: 고령 인지 허약에서 유산소 운동 중재: 체계적 문헌고찰

summary.question: 고령자의 인지 기능에 대해 유산소 운동이 효과적인지 평가한 연구이다.
summary.methods: 무작위대조시험(RCT)을 대상으로 10개 데이터베이스를 검색한 체계적 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 포함된 대부분의 연구에서 유산소 운동은 인지 기능, 언어 유창성, 주의, 수면의 질, 집행기능 등에서 유의한 개선과 관련되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 고령 인지 허약 환자에서 유산소 운동은 인지 및 일부 신체 기능 개선과 연관될 수 있으나, 중재 형태와 강도 모니터링이 이질적이어서 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 중재 유형과 강도 모니터링이 매우 이질적이고, 포함 연구의 맹검 및 설계 질이 다양했다.

pico.p: 고령의 인지 허약 또는 인지 기능 저하가 있는 성인
pico.o: 인지 기능, 언어 유창성, 주의, 수면의 질, 집행기능, 자세 균형

papers.title: Herbal medicines modulate gut microbiota in metabolic diseases: a review.
papers.authors: Lan X, Wei Y, Zhao Y, Lai Y
papers.abstract:
Metabolic diseases-including obesity, type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM), and non-alcoholic fatty liver disease (NAFLD)-affect over 1 billion individuals globally and are characterized by insulin resistance, chronic inflammation, and gut microbiota dysbiosis. Herbal medicines offer multi-component therapeutic potential through microbiota modulation, but mechanistic insights remain fragmented.
This review synthesizes recent advances in herbal medicine-mediated gut microbiota regulation in metabolic diseases and delineates underlying molecular mechanisms.
A comprehensive literature search was conducted across PubMed and Web of Science. Search strategies employed MeSH terms and free-text keywords encompassing herbal medicines, gut microbiota, and metabolic diseases. Two authors performed study selection and data extraction. Evidence synthesis was structured according to intervention type and metabolic disease category.
Herbal polysaccharides and other compounds consistently increased beneficial bacteria and promoted short-chain fatty acids (SCFAs) production, improving intestinal barrier integrity via ZO-1/Occludin upregulation and attenuating TLR4/NF-κB-mediated inflammation. Herbal formulations exerted synergistic effects by remodeling microbial community structure, correcting SCFA/bile acid imbalances, and activating IRS1/PI3K/AKT insulin signaling. Notably, Lactobacillus and Akkermansia emerged as recurrent beneficial targets across multiple herbal interventions. However, evidence is predominantly preclinical, and translational validity to humans requires further validation.
Herbal medicines ameliorate metabolic diseases through multi-target gut microbiota modulation, involving SCFA production, bile acid metabolism, and inflammatory pathway attenuation. These mechanistic insights support the development of microbiota-targeted herbal therapeutics, though clinical translation necessitates standardized formulations and rigorous human trials.
papers.title_ko: 대사질환에서 장내 미생물을 조절하는 한약재: 고찰

summary.question: 한약이 비만, 제2형 당뇨병, 비알코올성 지방간질환에서 장내 미생물과 대사 이상을 어떻게 조절하는지 살펴본 연구이다.
summary.methods: PubMed와 Web of Science 문헌을 검색해 한약과 장내 미생물, 대사질환 관련 연구를 유형별로 정리한 서술적 고찰이다.
summary.results: 한약 다당류와 복합제는 유익균 증가, 단쇄지방산 생성, 장장벽 강화, 염증 억제 및 인슐린 신호 개선과 연관되었으나 근거는 주로 전임상 연구였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한약의 대사질환 관련 효과는 장내 미생물 조절이라는 기전적 근거가 있으나, 실제 임상 적용을 위해서는 표준화된 제형과 인간 대상 근거가 더 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 근거가 대부분 전임상 연구로 구성되어 있어 사람에서의 유효성과 재현성은 아직 충분히 확립되지 않았다.

pico.p: 비만, 제2형 당뇨병, 비알코올성 지방간질환 환자 및 관련 전임상 모델
pico.o: 장내 미생물 조절, 단쇄지방산 및 담즙산 대사 변화, 염증 및 인슐린 저항성 개선

papers.title: Quality control of traditional Chinese medicine solid preparation Zhizi Jinhua Pills via FT-IR, UV and THz fingerprints assisted with dissolution.
papers.journal: Spectrochimica acta. Part A, Molecular and biomolecular spectroscopy
papers.authors: Wang X, Zou K, Li P, Zhu W, Cui H, Xiao L et al.
papers.abstract: The chemical complexity and compositional diversity of traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) and its proprietary preparations present substantial challenges to their quality control. Spectroscopic detection techniques represent a powerful tool for TCM quality assessment owing to their rapidity, non-destructiveness, and environmental friendliness. Nevertheless, spectral information overlap has long impeded effective qualitative and quantitative analysis. In this study, Fourier transform infrared (FT-IR), ultraviolet (UV), and terahertz (THz) spectroscopic techniques were employed to establish multi-dimensional spectral fingerprints for Zhizi Jinhua Pills (ZZJHPs). Original spectra were processed using the quantum fingerprinting method, and qualitative similarity (Sm) and quantitative similarity (Pm) were further evaluated via the systematically quantified fingerprint method. Based on the integrated tri-spectral fingerprint analysis, 32 batches of ZZJHP samples were categorized into three distinct quality grades. In addition, the overall dissolution behavior of ZZJHPs was systematically investigated using a full ultraviolet fingerprint (FUV-FP) strategy. The established FUV-FP method enabled rapid and accurate characterization of in vitro dissolution profiles. Among all samples, two batches exhibited relatively slow dissolution rates, whereas four batches displayed faster release behavior, which was sensitively distinguished by the quantitative similarity parameter Pm. This work provides an effective strategy for resolving spectral information overlap in TCM spectroscopic analysis. It also promotes the application of UV fingerprinting for holistic dissolution evaluation, thereby offering a reliable and practical technical approach for the quality control of TCM solid preparations.
papers.title_ko: FT-IR, UV 및 THz 지문분석과 용출 평가를 활용한 전통중의약 고형제제 지자금화환의 품질관리

summary.question: 지자금화환의 품질과 용출 특성을 다중 분광 지문분석으로 효과적으로 평가할 수 있는지 확인하였다.
summary.methods: 32개 배치의 지자금화환에 대해 FT-IR, UV, THz 분광 지문을 구축하고, 정량적 유사도 분석과 전체 UV 지문 기반 용출평가를 수행한 연구이다.
summary.results: 통합 삼중 분광 지문분석으로 시료들은 3개 품질 등급으로 분류되었고, FUV-FP는 용출 차이를 빠르게 구분했으며 일부 배치에서 느린 또는 빠른 용출이 확인되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한약 고형제제의 품질관리에 분광 지문분석과 용출 지문평가가 유용한 기술적 접근이 될 수 있으나, 실제 임상적 유효성 판단과는 구분해 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 분광 기반 품질평가 연구로 임상 효능이나 안전성을 직접 보여주지 않으며, 특정 제품의 분석적 결과이므로 일반화에는 주의가 필요하다.

pico.p: 지자금화환(ZZJHP) 배치 시료
pico.i: FT-IR, UV, THz 지문분석과 FUV-FP 용출평가
pico.o: 품질 등급 분류와 용출 특성 구분

papers.title: Corrigendum to "Cheek acupuncture can improve the depressive and anxious symptoms of patients with moderate depression disorders" [Complement Ther Med 99 (2026), 103383].
papers.authors: Jia X, Shen P, Wang C, Zhou G, Zhou H, Xu F et al.

papers.title: Hangeshashinto for the prevention of oral mucositis in patients receiving chemotherapy: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
papers.journal: Supportive care in cancer : official journal of the Multinational Association of Supportive Care in Cancer
papers.authors: Ishizuka M, Shibuya N, Hachiya H, Nishi Y, Kono T, Takayanagi M et al.
papers.abstract:
Among several adverse events induced by chemotherapy for patients with far advanced and unresectable cancer, oral mucositis is one that reduces patient quality of life.
To evaluate the preventive effects of hangeshashinto on oral mucositis induced by chemotherapy.
We performed a comprehensive electronic literature search (PubMed, the Web of Science, and CENTRAL) up to March 2024 to identify studies showing the efficacy of hangeshashinto administration for preventing oral mucositis in patients receiving chemotherapy. To integrate the individual preventive effect of hangeshashinto, a meta-analysis was performed using random-effects models to calculate the risk ratio and 95% confidence interval, and heterogeneity was analyzed using I2 statistics. In this analysis, oral mucositis was defined as more than grade 1 mucositis.
This meta-analysis included six studies (five randomized controlled trials and one case-matched study) involving 293 patients with cancer receiving chemotherapy. Among 141 patients who received hangeshashinto during chemotherapy, 65 (46.1%) developed oral mucositis; in contrast, among 152 patients who did not receive hangeshashinto or received a placebo, 78 (51.3%) developed oral mucositis. The meta-analysis suggested that hangeshashinto may reduce the risk of oral mucositis (risk ratio = 0.86, 95% confidence interval = 0.73-1.00, P = 0.05, I2 = 0%) compared with no hangeshashinto or placebo.
The results of this meta-analysis suggest that hangeshashinto may have a preventive effect against chemotherapy-induced oral mucositis. However, further well-designed randomized controlled trials are required to confirm its preventive efficacy.
papers.title_ko: 항암화학요법 환자에서 구내점막염 예방을 위한 한계사심탕의 체계적 문헌고찰 및 메타분석

summary.question: 항암화학요법으로 유발되는 구내점막염 예방에 한계사심탕이 효과적인지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 2024년 3월까지의 문헌을 검색해 항암화학요법 환자에서 한계사심탕의 예방효과를 평가한 연구들을 무작위효과 메타분석으로 통합했다.
summary.results: 6개 연구의 메타분석에서 한계사심탕은 대조군보다 구내점막염 위험을 낮추는 경향을 보였다(RR 0.86, 95% CI 0.73-1.00, P=0.05).
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한계사심탕은 항암화학요법 관련 구내점막염 예방에 잠재적 가능성이 있으나, 근거는 아직 제한적이므로 임상 적용은 추가 연구 결과를 함께 봐야 한다.
summary.limitations: 포함 연구 수와 규모가 제한적이고 일부 비무작위 연구가 포함되어 예방효과의 확실성이 낮다.

pico.p: 항암화학요법을 받는 암 환자
pico.o: 1등급 초과 구내점막염 발생

papers.title: Sacral nerve stimulation modulates disease activity and autonomic function in active rheumatoid arthritis: a randomized pilot study.
papers.authors: Wang X, Xu B, Wang G, Yang L, Su D, Chen JDZ
papers.abstract:
To evaluate the feasibility and safety as well as potential effects of percutaneous sacral nerve stimulation (SNS) via acupuncture needles in patients with active rheumatoid arthritis (RA).
Twenty-one patients with active RA were allocated to receive either active SNS (n = 11) or sham stimulation (n = 10) for 60 min daily over 14 days. Primary outcomes were changes in disease activity, assessed by the Disease Activity Score in 28 joints (DAS-28), tender joint count (TJC), swollen joint count (SJC), pain intensity on a visual analogue scale (VAS), erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR), and C-reactive protein (CRP). Secondary outcomes included the following: (1) patient-reported outcomes for joint function, fatigue, anxiety, and depression; (2) serum levels of inflammatory cytokines; and (3) heart rate variability (HRV) parameters as a measure of autonomic function.
In this pilot study, the SNS group showed significant within-group improvements in TJC, VAS, DAS28-ESR, and DAS28-CRP. However, an analysis of covariance (ANCOVA) adjusting for baseline values revealed no significant between-group differences in clinical and inflammatory parameters. The SNS group showed a significant increase in rMSSD (parasympathetic marker), with the between-group difference sustained after baseline adjustment. No significant differences were observed in functional and psychological scores or serum cytokine levels between the two groups.
This first-in-human study indicates that percutaneous SNS is feasible and safe, with a possible modulatory effect on autonomic function in active RA. Further large‑scale, adequately powered trials are warranted to confirm the clinical efficacy and mechanisms of SNS in RA.
This study was registered at ClinicalTrials.gov on March 25, 2021 under the identifier NCT04821050 (Protocol ID: 202002053). Key Points • First-in-human pilot study of percutaneous sacral nerve stimulation (SNS) in active RA. • SNS was associated with significant within-group improvements in tender joint count, pain VAS, and DAS28, but between-group differences did not reach statistical significance after baseline adjustment. • SNS significantly enhances parasympathetic activity (rMSSD) compared with sham stimulation, an effect that remained significant after adjusting for baseline differences. • Percutaneous SNS was safe and well-tolerated, with no serious adverse events reported.
papers.title_ko: 활동성 류마티스관절염에서 천수신경자극이 질병 활성도와 자율신경 기능을 조절하는가: 무작위 파일럿 연구

summary.question: 경피적 천수신경자극이 활동성 류마티스관절염의 질병 활성도와 자율신경 기능에 영향을 주는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 활동성 류마티스관절염 환자를 활성 천수신경자극군과 가짜자극군으로 무작위 배정해 14일간 매일 60분 시행한 파일럿 RCT이다.
summary.results: 활성군은 군내에서 압통관절수, 통증 VAS, DAS28이 호전되었으나 군간 임상·염증지표 차이는 없었고, rMSSD는 유의하게 증가했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 경피적 천수신경자극은 안전하고 시행 가능했으며 자율신경 조절 가능성을 시사하지만, 류마티스관절염의 임상적 효과는 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 표본이 매우 작은 파일럿 연구로, 군간 임상적 유효성과 기전 결론을 내리기에는 근거가 제한적이다.

pico.p: 활동성 류마티스관절염 환자
pico.o: DAS-28, TJC, SJC, 통증 VAS, ESR, CRP 및 HRV

papers.title: Yinhuapinggan granules regulate PI3K/AKT and RAS/MAPK pathways to inhibit Streptococcus Pneumoniae-induced inflammatory responses.
papers.authors: Gu C, Yu D, Chen T, Chen A, Li C, Zhou H et al.
papers.abstract: Streptococcus pneumoniae is a major cause of pneumonia and other diseases. First-line antibiotics work for infections; however, drug-resistant strains complicate their control. Traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) may help treat drug-resistant infections, although the underlying mechanism is unclear. This study explored the efficacy and mechanism of action of Yinhuapinggan Granules (YHPG) in infected mice, focusing on the PI3K/AKT and RAS/MAPK pathways. A mouse model of Streptococcus pneumoniae infection was established using an intranasal instillation approach. Different doses of Yinhuapinggan granules were then continuously administered for six days after infection. Hematoxylin-eosin (HE) staining, immunohistochemical staining, quantitative polymerase chain reaction (qPCR) analysis and western blotting were used to assess the effects of Yinhuapinggan Granules on the histopathological changes in the lungs, the levels of inflammatory factors and the expression of relevant signaling pathway proteins in mice. YHPG reduces lung damage, inflammation and neutrophil infiltration in mice. These findings suggest that the anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects of YHPG are associated with the observed phenomena. YHPG inhibited the upregulation of streptococcus pneumoniae-induced pathway-associated signaling proteins (IκBα, JNK, P38 and ERK), which may be related to the regulation of the PI3K/AKT and RAS/MAPK signaling pathways. The findings of this study provide experimental evidence for the efficacy and anti-inflammatory mechanism of YHPG against pneumonia caused by Streptococcus pneumoniae infection. The present study confirms that YHPG particles can exhibit therapeutic effects in Streptococcus pneumoniae-infected mice by modulating the PI3K/AKT and Ras/MAPK pathways.
papers.title_ko: 인후평간 과립이 PI3K/AKT 및 RAS/MAPK 경로를 조절해 폐렴구균 유도 염증반응을 억제한다

summary.question: 인후평간 과립이 폐렴구균 감염에서 항염·면역조절 효과를 보이는지와 그 기전을 확인하고자 했다.
summary.methods: 폐렴구균을 비강 내 접종해 만든 마우스 감염모델에서 인후평간 과립을 6일간 투여하고, 조직염색과 qPCR, western blot으로 폐 손상과 염증 및 신호전달계 변화를 평가했다.
summary.results: 인후평간 과립은 마우스에서 폐 손상, 염증, 호중구 침윤을 줄였고 PI3K/AKT 및 RAS/MAPK 관련 신호단백질의 증가를 억제했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 인후평간 과립이 폐렴구균 감염의 염증반응을 완화할 가능성을 시사하지만, 동물실험 결과이므로 임상 적용 해석에는 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 마우스 감염모델 연구로 인간 환자에서의 효과와 안전성은 이 abstract만으로는 확인할 수 없다.

pico.p: 폐렴구균 감염 마우스
pico.o: 폐 손상, 염증, 호중구 침윤 및 PI3K/AKT·RAS/MAPK 관련 단백질 변화

papers.title: Evaluation of acupuncture, movement therapies and imaging costs among Veterans with chronic musculoskeletal pain.
papers.journal: Acupuncture in medicine : journal of the British Medical Acupuncture Society
papers.authors: Frochen S, Taylor SL, Coggeshall S, Chen C, Zeliadt SB
papers.abstract:
Some complementary and integrative health (CIH) therapies are recommended for the management of chronic musculoskeletal pain, but little research has evaluated how these alternatives affect downstream healthcare utilization, including imaging costs.
Using US Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) Veterans Health Administration electronic health record data, we conducted propensity score modeling, allocating 2,215,231 Veterans with chronic pain using the VA from 2018 to 2022 into two therapy exposure groups - acupuncture with and without movement therapies (yoga or Tai Chi/Qigong) - compared with conventional care, or primary care management alone, to examine differences in imaging costs during a 6-month period following indexing. We calculated the probability of treatment in either exposure group based on demographic and clinical characteristics, and applied a nearest neighbor matching algorithm for subsequent estimation of average treatment effects.
Veterans using acupuncture with or without movement therapies had sizable baseline clinical needs and healthcare utilization. After matching, we found that imaging costs and visits were higher among Veterans using acupuncture with CIH movement therapies (cost difference $140, 95% confidence interval (CI) $97-$183; visit difference 0.37; 95% CI 0.30-0.45) and without CIH movement therapies (cost difference $155, 95% CI $147-$163; visit difference 0.34; 95% CI 0.33-0.35) during the 6-month follow-up period, compared with those using conventional care.
Veterans using acupuncture with or without CIH movement therapies had greater imaging costs than those using conventional care, possibly reflecting higher usage of healthcare among integrative therapy patients. These results also suggest unobserved patterns of comorbidity, recovery or access and/or radiology inefficiencies leading to an imaging loop effect as potential considerations for future investigation.
papers.title_ko: 만성 근골격계 통증 재향군인에서 침치료, 움직임 치료와 영상검사 비용 평가

summary.question: 만성 근골격계 통증 재향군인에서 침치료 유무와 움직임 치료 병행이 이후 영상검사 비용에 차이가 있는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 미국 재향군인보건청 전자의무기록을 이용한 성향점수 매칭 관찰연구로, 침치료 단독 또는 요가·태극권/기공 병행군을 일반적 진료군과 비교해 6개월간 영상검사 비용을 분석하였다.
summary.results: 매칭 후 침치료 병행군과 비병행군 모두 일반적 진료군보다 6개월 영상검사 비용과 방문 수가 더 높았다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 통합의료 치료 이용이 영상검사 비용 증가와 연관될 수 있어, 실제 진료 이용 양상과 교란 가능성을 함께 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 관찰연구이므로 비측정 교란과 선택 편향을 배제할 수 없고, 비용 증가의 원인을 직접 설명하지는 못한다.

pico.p: VA에서 만성 근골격계 통증을 가진 재향군인
pico.o: 6개월 추적 기간의 영상검사 비용과 방문 수

papers.title: Lumbar epidural haematoma after acupuncture: a case report and review of the literature.
papers.authors: Cao W, Zhang X, Li D, Jiang Z
papers.abstract:
Acupuncture is widely used for lumbar pain, yet needle-related spinal epidural haematoma (SEH) remains a rarely reported but potentially catastrophic complication. The lumbar segment is often assumed to be a "safe" needling zone, and the true incidence, mechanistic basis and preventive strategy for iatrogenic SEH are poorly defined.
An 80-year-old Chinese man developed progressive right lumbosciatalgia 10 days after three sessions of electro-acupuncture and a right L5-S1 paravertebral nerve block. Pre-intervention CT had shown no epidural collection; repeat imaging revealed a 3 cm organised haematoma compressing the thecal sac. Formal WHO-UMC causality assessment rated the event 'Probable' iatrogenic, though competing causality with the nerve block cannot be fully excluded. He underwent urgent L5-S1 laminectomy, clot evacuation and cement-augmented pedicle-screw fixation, with complete neurological recovery at 3 months.
This case, together with a systematic review of seven similar reports, establishes a clear clinical pathway: repeated lumbosacral needling-venous wall trauma-organised haematoma-nerve-root compression. Key preventive measures include pre-procedure MRI in high-risk subjects, careful individualization of needle depth and electro-acupuncture parameters based on patient anatomy and clinical context. Advanced age and spinal degeneration are not surgical contraindications; timely decompression restores function even after prolonged compression.
papers.title_ko: 침술 후 발생한 요추 경막외 혈종: 증례 보고 및 문헌 고찰

summary.question: 침술 후 요추 경막외 혈종이 어떻게 발생하고 어떤 예방·임상적 시사점이 있는지를 살펴본 보고이다.
summary.methods: 80세 남성 증례를 보고하고 유사 증례 7편을 체계적으로 검토한 증례 보고 및 문헌 고찰이다.
summary.results: 반복된 요천추 부위 자극 후 정맥벽 손상과 혈종 형성, 신경근 압박으로 이어질 수 있으며, 적시에 감압하면 기능 회복이 가능했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 요추 부위도 드문 척수 경막외 혈종이 발생할 수 있으므로, 고위험 환자에서는 해부학적 상태와 시술 맥락을 고려한 신중한 시술 계획이 필요하다는 점을 시사한다.
summary.limitations: 증례와 제한된 수의 유사 보고에 근거해 인과와 예방 전략을 일반화하기는 어렵다.

pico.p: 요통 또는 요천추 부위 시술을 받은 환자
pico.o: 요추 척수 경막외 혈종 및 신경학적 압박

papers.title: Advances in electroacupuncture for perioperative neurocognitive disorders: mechanisms and clinical evidence.
papers.authors: Wei S, Zhou S, Tu J, Zhi T, Wang Y, Shen Q et al.
papers.abstract: Perioperative neurocognitive disorders (PND), including postoperative delirium, delayed neurocognitive recovery, and postoperative cognitive dysfunction, are common complications in older surgical patients and are associated with impaired recovery, reduced quality of life, and increased postoperative morbidity. Current management remains largely supportive and preventive, and effective targeted therapies are still lacking. Electroacupuncture (EA), as a minimally invasive neuromodulatory intervention, has attracted increasing attention because of its potential multi-target regulatory effects. This review summarizes current mechanistic and clinical evidence regarding EA for PND. Preclinical studies suggest that EA may modulate several interacting pathological processes, including neuroinflammation, oxidative stress, autophagy dysfunction, ferroptosis, mitochondrial injury, microbiota-gut-brain axis dysregulation, and hippocampal synaptic plasticity. Recent PND/POCD animal studies further support EA-related regulation of NLRP3 inflammasome activation, cGAS-STING signaling, SIRT1/NRF2/GPX4-mediated ferroptosis, AMPK/SIRT1/FOXO1/PINK1/Parkin-related autophagy pathways, and MAPK-related synaptic plasticity. Clinical studies and meta-analyses suggest that EA and related acupoint-based electrical stimulation techniques may reduce early postoperative cognitive decline and improve short-term cognitive outcomes in older surgical patients. However, the overall evidence remains limited by heterogeneous stimulation protocols, variable acupoint prescriptions, incomplete blinding, short follow-up, and reliance on cognitive screening scales. Several proposed mechanisms are still partly inferred from non-PND models. Future studies should use standardized EA protocols, clinically relevant PND models, dynamic mechanistic assessments, and adequately powered sham-controlled trials to clarify the therapeutic role of EA in PND.
papers.title_ko: 수술 전후 신경인지장애에서 전침의 진전: 기전과 임상근거

summary.question: 전침이 수술 전후 신경인지장애를 줄이고 인지예후를 개선할 수 있는지 검토한 논문이다.
summary.methods: 전임상 및 임상 연구와 메타분석을 종합해 전침의 기전과 임상 근거를 서술적으로 정리한 프로토콜성 리뷰이다.
summary.results: 전침은 신경염증, 산화스트레스, 자가포식 이상, 페롭토시스, 미토콘드리아 손상, 장-뇌 축 이상, 시냅스 가소성 등에 관여할 가능성이 있으며 초기 수술 후 인지저하를 줄일 수 있다는 임상근거가 제시되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 노인 수술환자에서 전침은 수술 전후 인지장애의 보조적 가능성이 있으나, 현재 근거는 이질적이고 제한적이어서 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 자극 프로토콜과 혈위가 불균일하고 맹검과 추적기간이 제한적이며, 일부 기전은 PND가 아닌 모델에서 추론되었다.

pico.p: 수술을 받는 고령 환자에서 수술 전후 신경인지장애
pico.o: 초기 수술 후 인지저하와 단기 인지결과

papers.title: Intervention Outcomes for Meniere's Disease: An Umbrella Review.
papers.authors: Chun WB, Nguyen SA, Mills JF, Chen K, Monaghan NP, Brennan EA et al.
papers.abstract:
To assess and summarize the outcomes of major pharmacologic, device-based, and surgical interventions reported in systematic reviews and meta-analyses for the treatment of Meniere's disease.
CINAHL, Cochrane, PubMed, Scopus.
Twenty-two systematic reviews with meta-analyses of randomized and nonrandomized studies were identified, assessing interventions including gentamicin, corticosteroids, betahistine, positive pressure therapy, adjunctive acupuncture, endolymphatic sac decompression, and cochlear implantation. The review was reported in accordance with PRISMA 2020 and PRISMA-S, and methods followed Cochrane Handbook guidance. Four investigators extracted data. When possible, data were pooled using a random-effects model. Outcomes included vertigo control, tinnitus improvement, and adverse events.
Intratympanic gentamicin showed the highest vertigo control rate (89%) but carried a mild hearing loss risk and a 23% subjective hearing reduction rate. Intratympanic steroids offered modest benefit with fewer auditory risks. Positive pressure therapy showed mixed results, while acupuncture demonstrated symptomatic benefit when combined with other therapies. Endolymphatic sac decompression achieved 75%-82% control of vertigo initially but declined over time. Cochlear implants improved speech perception and tinnitus in profound hearing loss. No eligible meta-analyses evaluated antivirals, ventilation tubes, vestibular nerve section, or labyrinthectomy.
Intratympanic gentamicin provides the strongest vertigo control but is backed by low-quality evidence and risks hearing loss. Conservative treatments like intratympanic steroids and betahistine show modest benefit with mixed evidence. Adjunctive options like acupuncture require cautious interpretation due to low-quality evidence. Surgical and device-based options demonstrate variable effectiveness, highlighting the need for individualized, symptom-driven care and further high-quality trials.
papers.title_ko: 메니에르병 중재의 치료 결과: 범우산 문헌고찰

summary.question: 메니에르병에서 주요 약물·기기·수술 중재의 임상 결과는 어떠한가?
summary.methods: 무작위 및 비무작위 연구의 체계적 문헌고찰과 메타분석을 대상으로 한 우산 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 고실 내 겐타마이신이 현기증 조절에 가장 효과적이었으나 청력 저하 위험이 있었고, 고실 내 스테로이드와 침은 제한적이거나 보조적 이득을 보였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 근거는 전반적으로 질이 낮아, 한의사는 침구를 보조적 선택지로 해석하되 다른 중재와 함께의 근거 수준을 신중히 평가할 필요가 있다.
summary.limitations: 포함된 메타분석들의 근거 질이 낮고 이질성이 있어 중재 간 효과를 직접 비교하기 어렵다.

pico.p: 메니에르병 환자
pico.i: 겐타마이신, 스테로이드, 베타히스틴, 양압요법, 보조적 침, 내림프낭 감압술, 인공와우
pico.o: 현기증 조절, 이명 개선, 이상반응

papers.title: Effects of Astragalus membranaceus injection at Zusanli (ST36) acupoint on lung cancer with COPD.
papers.authors: Zheng Y, Xu C, Zhu T, Xia J, Wei Y, Jin Q
papers.abstract: This study investigates the antitumor effects and immunomodulatory mechanisms of Astragalus membranaceus (AM) injection at Zusanli (ST36) acupoint in a mouse model of lung cancer with chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (LC-COPD). Mice were divided into LC-COPD and lung cancer-only groups, each further subdivided into model, AM, cisplatin (DDP), and AM + DDP subgroups. Tumor growth, lung metastasis, and survival were assessed. Expression of PD-1 and TIM-3 in tumor tissues was evaluated by immunohistochemistry and Western blot. The proportions of PD-1⁺ and PD-1⁺ TIM-3⁺ CD8⁺ and CD4⁺ T cells were analyzed by flow cytometry. AM injection at Zusanli alone inhibited tumor weight to a similar extent in both the LC-COPD and lung cancer-only groups, but conferred greater inhibition of pulmonary metastasis and prolonged survival only the LC-COPD group. Combining this therapy with DDP further reduced tumor weight and metastasis and extended survival, outperforming either single treatment in the LC-COPD group only. AM intervention downregulated PD-1 and TIM-3 expression in tumor tissues and reduced the proportions of PD-1⁺ and PD-1⁺ TIM-3⁺ CD8⁺ and CD4⁺ T cells. These immunomodulatory effects were greater in the LC-COPD group. In the LC-COPD model, AM injection at Zusanli significantly downregulated PD-1 and TIM-3 expression and alleviated T cell exhaustion. This may explain why LC-COPD derives greater benefit from this therapy. The combination of this therapy with DDP enhanced anti-tumor efficacy, suggesting its promise as an effective treatment strategy for LC-COPD.
papers.title_ko: 족삼리(ST36) 혈위 자추자 아스트라갈루스 막세브라누스 주사의 폐암-만성폐쇄성폐질환에 대한 효과

summary.question: 족삼리(ST36) 혈위 아스트라갈루스 막세브라누스 주사가 폐암-만성폐쇄성폐질환에서 항종양 및 면역조절 효과가 있는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 폐암-만성폐쇄성폐질환 마우스 모델과 폐암 단독 모델에서 AM 주사, 시스플라틴, 병용군을 두고 종양 성장, 폐 전이, 생존, PD-1/TIM-3 발현과 T세포 아형을 비교했다.
summary.results: AM 주사는 두 모델에서 종양량을 비슷하게 억제했으나 폐 전이와 생존 개선은 폐암-만성폐쇄성폐질환군에서 더 두드러졌고, 병용 시 효과가 더 커졌으며 PD-1/TIM-3와 T세포 피로가 감소했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 동물모델에서 족삼리 자추자 AM 주사가 면역억제를 완화하며 특히 폐암-만성폐쇄성폐질환 상황에서 더 큰 이득을 보일 수 있음을 시사하지만, 임상 적용은 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 마우스 전임상 연구이므로 사람 환자에서의 유효성과 안전성을 직접 결론내릴 수 없다.

pico.p: 폐암-만성폐쇄성폐질환 및 폐암 단독 마우스 모델
pico.c: 모델군, 시스플라틴 단독, 또는 병용 비교
pico.o: 종양 중량, 폐 전이, 생존, PD-1/TIM-3 발현, T세포 피로

papers.title: Real-world treatment patterns in patients with dysmenorrhea in Japan: a retrospective database study.
papers.authors: Goto D, Uchiyama M, Zhao A, Osuga Y
papers.abstract:
Dysmenorrhea poses significant disease burden beyond menstruation pain but patients are known to be undertreated.
To describe treatment patterns after the diagnosis of dysmenorrhea using health insurance claims data from insured members in Japan.
We analyzed treatment patterns following the diagnosis of dysmenorrhea in women aged 18-45 years using health insurance claims from multiple Japanese health insurance societies between January 1, 2017 and September 30, 2022. We examined the first-line and subsequent treatment lines up to the third line treatments.
A total of 70,981 patients were identified, with a mean age of 29.7 years old. The most common first-line treatments and their median [interquartile range] durations were as follows: low-dose estrogen-progestin (LEP; otherwise known as combined oral contraceptive) in 33,169 patients (46.7%) for 161 [65, 384] days, analgesics/hemostatic agents (symptomatic therapy) in 13,619 patients (19.2%) for 9 [5, 29] days, and Kampo medicine (Chinese traditional herbal medicine adapted to and evolved in Japan) in 10,835 patients (15.3%) for 62 [29, 134] days. Across the treatment sequences from the first to third lines, LEP was the most frequently prescribed therapy. The most frequent pattern was LEP plus analgesics/hemostatic agents (18,019; 25.4%), followed by LEP monotherapy (10,389;14.6%), which collectively accounted for approximately 40% of all treatments. Analgesics/hemostatic agents alone accounted for 8,523 (12.0%) and Kampo medicine alone for 4,806 (6.8%). The transition from analgesics/hemostatic agents to LEP occurred in 2,166 (3.1%) of patients.
An analysis of treatment sequences up to the third line revealed that LEP was the most commonly prescribed medication for dysmenorrhea. The median duration of LEP use exceeded five months, suggesting that many patients continued LEP across multiple menstrual cycles and that LEP was well accepted and sustained as a treatment for dysmenorrhea in Japan.
papers.title_ko: 일본 월경통 환자의 실제 진료 현황: 후향적 데이터베이스 연구

summary.question: 일본의 월경통 진단 환자에서 실제 치료 패턴이 어떻게 이루어지는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 2017년부터 2022년까지 일본 건강보험 청구자료를 이용한 18~45세 여성의 후향적 치료 패턴 분석 연구이다.
summary.results: 첫 치료와 이후 치료 모두에서 저용량 에스트로겐-프로게스틴(LEP)이 가장 흔했으며, LEP 사용 기간의 중앙값은 5개월을 넘었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 월경통에서 LEP와 한방약(캄포)이 실제 진료에서 사용되지만, 이 연구는 처방 패턴을 보여줄 뿐 효과나 안전성을 직접 입증하지는 않는다.
summary.limitations: 청구자료 기반 후향적 연구로 임상 중증도, 증상 개선, 처방 이유를 충분히 반영하지 못한다.

pico.p: 일본 건강보험에 가입된 18~45세 월경통 여성
pico.o: 1차~3차 치료 패턴과 치료 지속 기간

papers.title: Metabolomics approach using UHPLC/QE-MS for the mechanism of He Xue Ming Mu tablets on non-proliferative diabetic retinopathy.
papers.authors: Liu H, Yang X, Jia X, Geletu Q, Hong F, Zhang B
papers.abstract: He Xue Ming Mu Tablets (HXMMT) are traditional Chinese medicine formulations used in clinical practice for the treatment of diabetic retinopathy. The primary purpose of this article is to illuminate the potential mechanistic pathways underlying its therapeutic efficacy in non-proliferative diabetic retinopathy. UHPLC/QE-MS was used for plasma metabolomics analysis of 10 HXMMT-treated NPDR patients, 10 untreated NPDR patients, and 10 healthy controls. To identify differential metabolites, principal component analysis (PCA) for visualizing metabolic variation and hierarchical clustering for grouping samples by metabolic profiles, were combined with Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) pathway enrichment analysis to investigate related biological pathways.
