Intraocular pressure (IOP), best-corrected visual acuity (BCVA), central foveal thickness (CFT), and inflammatory/angiogenic markers (IL-6, TNF-α, VEGF, Ang-2) were assessed, with correlations analyzed between altered metabolites and clinical indices. HXMMT significantly improved macular edema, reduced fundus hemorrhage, and attenuated retinal inflammation (P < 0.05). Metabolomic profiling identified a total of 813 plasma metabolites, and 283 metabolites exhibited distinct expression patterns that effectively discriminated NPDR patients from healthy controls, while 39 metabolites were found to distinguish between untreated NPDR patients and those who received HXMMT treatment. Consequently, 12 key metabolites showed significant covariance with clinical parameters of NPDR (P < 0.05), suggesting their potential role as critical mediators in the pharmacodynamic mechanism of HXMMT. HXMMT exerts therapeutic effects on NPDR by targeting 12 plasma metabolites, particularly via the glycerophospholipid metabolic axis, providing a mechanistic basis for its clinical use.
papers.title_ko: 비증식성 당뇨망막병증에서 허혈명목환의 기전을 UHPLC/QE-MS 대사체학으로 분석한 연구

summary.question: 허혈명목환이 비증식성 당뇨망막병증에서 어떤 대사 경로와 임상 지표와 연관되어 작용하는지를 평가한 연구이다.
summary.methods: HXMMT 치료 NPDR 환자, 비치료 NPDR 환자, 건강대조군의 혈장 대사체를 UHPLC/QE-MS로 분석하고 PCA, 군집분석, KEGG 경로분석 및 임상지표 상관분석을 시행한 임상연구이다.
summary.results: HXMMT는 황반부종과 안저출혈 및 염증 관련 지표를 개선했고, 12개 핵심 혈장 대사체와 특히 glycerophospholipid 대사축이 NPDR의 치료기전과 관련된 것으로 나타났다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 허혈명목환의 NPDR 관련 작용 가능성을 대사체학적으로 뒷받침하지만, 소규모 관찰 기반 결과이므로 임상적 유효성은 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 표본 수가 적고 대사체-임상 상관분석 중심이라 인과관계를 확정하기 어렵다.

pico.p: 비증식성 당뇨망막병증 환자
pico.c: 무치료 비증식성 당뇨망막병증 환자 및 건강대조군
pico.o: 혈장 대사체 변화와 IOP, BCVA, CFT, 염증/혈관신생 표지자 및 안저 소견

papers.title: Development of nano-micro composite Xiaochaihu decoction granules for enhanced antipyretic and anti-inflammatory efficacy.
papers.authors: Shen J, Xu Y, Cao L, Lei H, Dong S, Zhang L et al.
papers.abstract: Traditional liquid decoctions in traditional Chinese medicine (TCM) offer peak efficacy but suffer from physical instability, whereas commercial granules offer stability but often compromise the active nanoscale phase. To bridge this translational gap, a novel "efficacy phase" (EP) state integrating nanophase and suspension features was developed. Here, Xiao-Chai-Hu Decoction efficacy phase (XCHD-EP) was prepared via centrifugation and dialysis. Its solid granule formulation was optimized using Box-Behnken response surface analysis, and quality evaluated via high-performance liquid chromatography (HPLC). A lipopolysaccharide (LPS)-induced rat fever model was utilized to directly compare the in vivo efficacy of XCHD-EP against the raw decoction and commercial granules. Optimal XCHD-EP granules exhibited excellent physical stability. HPLC quantified key components, including baicalin (19.69 mg/g) and saikosaponin A (0.57 mg/g). Pharmacologically, XCHD-EP effectively reversed pyrexia and broadly downregulated key inflammatory mediators (PGE2, NO, cAMP, IL-1β, and IL-6). Crucially, modernized XCHD-EP granules achieved maximal antipyretic and anti-inflammatory efficacies comparable to the freshly prepared raw decoction (p > 0.05), demonstrating robust advantages over existing commercial granules. Grounded strictly in measured physicochemical and functional data, this study successfully translates the pharmacological potency of an unstable decoction into a stable solid form, providing a reliable strategy for TCM modernization.
papers.title_ko: 소시호탕 나노-미세 복합 과립의 항발열·항염 효능 강화 개발

summary.question: 소시호탕의 불안정한 탕액 효능을 안정한 과립형으로 보존할 수 있는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 센트리퓨지와 투석으로 효능상(EP)을 만들고 Box-Behnken 반응표면분석과 HPLC로 과립을 최적화한 뒤, LPS 유발 랫드 발열 모델에서 원탕액과 시판 과립과 비교하였다.
summary.results: XCHD-EP 과립은 물리적 안정성이 우수했고, 원탕액과 유의한 차이 없이 해열·항염 효과를 보였으며 시판 과립보다 우수하였다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한약 탕액의 약효를 안정한 과립형으로 전환하려는 제형 현대화 가능성을 시사하지만, 동물실험 결과이므로 임상적 효과는 별도 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 랫드 발열 모델의 전임상 연구로, 사람에서의 유효성과 안전성을 직접 확인할 수 없다.

pico.p: LPS로 발열을 유발한 랫드
pico.o: 체온 저하와 PGE2, NO, cAMP, IL-1β, IL-6 감소

papers.title: Extraction, structure and bioactivities of polysaccharide from Achyranthes bidentata: A review.
papers.authors: Cao S, Zhang Z, Du X, Cheng Y, Shi X, Zong A et al.
papers.abstract: Achyranthes bidentata (AB), a prominent medicinal herb in traditional Chinese medicine, possesses diverse bioactive components responsible for its broad spectrum of pharmacological activities. Achyranthes bidentata polysaccharides (ABP) are bioactive constituents isolated from AB. Common extraction techniques include hot water, ultrasound-assisted, microwave-assisted, and enzyme-assisted extraction. Purification typically involves deproteinization followed by column chromatography. Variations in extraction and purification methods can lead to differences in the structural characteristics and biological activities of the final products. Current studies have demonstrated that ABP exhibit a range of biological activities, including immunomodulatory, anti-tumor, antioxidant, and anti-osteoporotic effects. This article systematically reviews the extraction, isolation, purification methods, and biological activities of ABP, aiming to provide a valuable reference for further research on these bioactive compounds.
papers.title_ko: 우슬 다당의 추출, 구조 및 생리활성: 문헌고찰

summary.question: 우슬(Achyranthes bidentata) 다당의 추출·정제 방법과 생리활성은 무엇인가?
summary.methods: 우슬 다당의 추출, 분리, 정제 방법과 생물학적 활성을 체계적으로 정리한 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 우슬 다당은 면역조절, 항종양, 항산화, 항골다공증 관련 활성을 보인다고 보고되었고, 추출·정제 방법에 따라 구조와 활성이 달라질 수 있다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한의 임상에서 우슬의 다당 성분은 잠재적 생리활성 물질로 주목되지만, 실제 임상적 효용은 추가 연구로 확인이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 추출·정제 조건에 따른 이질성과 전임상 중심 근거로 인해 임상적 결론을 일반화하기 어렵다.

pico.p: 우슬(Achyranthes bidentata) 유래 다당
pico.i: 열수, 초음파, 마이크로파, 효소 보조 추출 및 정제
pico.o: 면역조절, 항종양, 항산화, 항골다공증 활성

papers.title: Combining electroacupuncture and transcutaneous electrical acupoint stimulation for psychiatric disorders in women victims of domestic violence: An assessor-blinded, randomised controlled trial.
papers.authors: Yang S, Mok WC, Cheung DST, Tiwari A, Cheng CPW, Chen H et al.
papers.abstract:
Women victims of domestic violence often present with psychiatric disorders and may benefit from nonpharmacological interventions. Acupoint stimulation therapy may be an effective approach.
To examine whether a combination of electroacupuncture (EA) and transcutaneous electrical acupoint stimulation (TEAS) can alleviate depression, post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD) and insomnia in women victims of domestic violence.
An assessor-blinded randomised controlled trial was conducted in Hong Kong, China, with 110 Chinese women with major depressive disorder who had experienced domestic violence and were randomly assigned to care as usual (CAU) alone or combined with EA + TEAS (n = 55 per group) for 12 weeks, two clinic-based EA sessions and three home-based TEAS sessions per week. The primary outcome was baseline-to-endpoint change in the Beck Depression Inventory-II (BDI-II). Secondary outcomes included the 17-item Hamilton Depression Rating Scale, 10-item Perceived Stress Scale, PTSD Check List-Civilian Version, Insomnia Severity Index and the 12-item Short Form Survey for health-related quality of life.
Of the 110 participants (n = 55 each group), 91.8% (101/110) completed the study. At 12 weeks, the EA + TEAS group showed a significantly greater reduction in BDI-II score than that of the CAU group (mean difference = -10.9; 95% confidence interval -16.5 to -5.4; t = -3.9; p < 0.001), exceeding the minimal clinically important difference (5 points). The superiority of EA + TEAS was also observed across secondary measures, including depression, PTSD, perceived stress, insomnia and quality of life. The EA + TEAS group had significantly higher rates of clinical response (49.1% vs. 18.2%, χ 2 = 11.770, p < 0.001) and remission (38.2% vs. 12.7%, χ 2 = 9.390, p = 0.002) at endpoint than those of the CAU group. All treatment-related adverse events were mild.
The addition of EA + TEAS produced substantially greater improvements in depression and other psychiatric symptoms. EA + TEAS may serve as an effective intervention for women victims of domestic violence.
This trial was registered on www.clinicaltrials.gov (NCT05102253).
papers.title_ko: 가정폭력 피해 여성의 정신질환에 대한 전침과 경피적 경혈 전기자극 병합치료: 평가자 눈가림 무작위대조시험

summary.question: 가정폭력 피해 여성에서 전침과 경피적 경혈 전기자극 병합치료가 우울, PTSD, 불면을 완화하는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 홍콩에서 주요우울장애가 있고 가정폭력을 경험한 여성 110명을 12주간 통상치료 단독 또는 전침+경피적 경혈 전기자극 병합치료로 무작위 배정한 평가자 눈가림 무작위대조시험이다.
summary.results: 병합치료군은 통상치료군보다 BDI-II 감소가 더 컸고, 우울·PTSD·스트레스·불면·삶의 질과 임상반응 및 관해에서도 더 좋은 결과를 보였으며 이상반응은 경미했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 가정폭력 피해 여성의 정신증상에서 전침과 TEAS 병합이 유망한 비약물적 중재일 수 있으나, 단일 연구 결과이므로 임상 적용은 신중해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 중국계 여성과 특정 지역의 12주 결과만 보고되어 일반화 가능성에 제한이 있다.

pico.p: 가정폭력을 경험한 주요우울장애 여성
pico.o: 우울, PTSD, 스트레스, 불면, 삶의 질, 임상반응 및 관해

papers.title: Individually tailored physiotherapy interventions for pregnancy-related pelvic girdle pain: functioning, physical activity, and treatment satisfaction four months postpartum. A cross-sectional study.
papers.authors: Ekdahl AS, Olsén MF, Gutke A
papers.abstract:
Pregnancy-related pelvic girdle pain (PPGP) affects more than 50% of pregnant women, and for some it may lead to persistent postpartum pain. The factors affecting the prevalence of PPGP postpartum are unclear. Recommended interventions for PPGP include exercise, pelvic belts, acupuncture, and promotion of physical activity. However, individually tailored interventions based on treatment guidelines are necessary given the multifaceted nature of PPGP, but this has not been evaluated in a clinical setting. The aim of this study was to describe levels of functioning, physical activity, pain, and treatment satisfaction at four months postpartum in women who received individually tailored physiotherapy based on treatment guidelines for PPGP and to investigate relationships between factors that could impact disability resulting from PPGP postpartum.
A cross-sectional study based on questionnaires answered four months postpartum by 164 women who received physiotherapy for PPGP during pregnancy. Treatment satisfaction, and functioning measured by the Pelvic Girdle Questionnaire (PGQ), were the primary outcomes, and multiple linear regression analyses were performed to investigate factors with a possible impact on the PGQ score.
Of the total respondents (n = 164), 125 women reported (76%) reported PPGP four months postpartum, of whom 40% (n = 50) experienced moderate-to-severe disability according to the PGQ. Most women were satisfied with the physiotherapy treatment, regardless of their level of disability. Concern about pain was the only variable associated with the PGQ score. Despite limitations in functioning among women who reported pain, one third reached the recommended levels of physical activity.
Although 76% of women experienced persistent PPGP four months postpartum, individually tailored physiotherapy for PPGP during pregnancy was perceived as an intervention with positive impact. Concern about pain appears to be associated with postpartum functioning, but the study design precludes causal conclusions.
FoU in Region Västra Götaland, Sweden No. 220,091, https://www.researchweb.org/is/vgr/project/220091 .
papers.title_ko: 임신 관련 골반대 통증에 대한 개인 맞춤 물리치료 중재: 산후 4개월의 기능, 신체활동, 치료 만족도에 대한 단면 연구

summary.question: 임신 중 개인 맞춤 물리치료를 받은 임신 관련 골반대 통증 여성에서 산후 4개월의 기능과 치료 만족도는 어떠하며, 어떤 요인이 장애와 관련되는가를 알아보았다.
summary.methods: 임신 중 PPGP로 물리치료를 받은 여성 164명을 대상으로 산후 4개월에 설문을 시행한 단면 연구였다.
summary.results: 응답자의 76%가 산후 4개월에도 PPGP를 보고했으며, 이 중 40%는 중등도-중증 장애를 보였고 대부분은 치료에 만족했으며 통증에 대한 걱정만 PGQ 점수와 관련되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 개인 맞춤 물리치료는 산후에도 지속되는 PPGP에서 긍정적으로 인식될 수 있으나, 통증에 대한 걱정이 기능 저하와 연관될 수 있어 해석 시 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 단면 연구라 인과관계를 결론지을 수 없고, 설문 기반 자료로 선택 및 회상 편향 가능성이 있다.

pico.p: 임신 중 PPGP로 물리치료를 받은 여성
pico.o: 산후 4개월의 기능(PGQ), 신체활동, 통증, 치료 만족도

papers.title: N-(4-Hydroxyphenethyl)-(4E)-decenamide derived from natural phytochemical of Anacyclus root ameliorates diabetic retinopathy by inhibiting angiogenesis via PARK7.
papers.authors: Ma Y, Sun H, Ji Q, Liu H, Wang J, Liu Y et al.
papers.abstract:
Anacyclus pyrethrum (L.) DC. is a herbaceous species of the Asteraceae family. This medicinal plant has been widely used in traditional medicine to treat diabetes and its associated complications. N-(4-Hydroxyphenethyl)-(4E)-decenamide (HPD) is a synthetic derivative of natural N-alkylamides extracted from its roots. To date, the therapeutic efficacy and molecular mechanisms of HPD against diabetic retinopathy (DR) have not been fully clarified.
This study aimed to explore the therapeutic potential of HPD against DR and clarify its molecular mechanisms.
HPD was chemically synthesized. Its anti-angiogenic efficacy was evaluated using both in vitro and in vivo assays. Proteomic analysis, combined with molecular docking and surface plasmon resonance (SPR), was employed to screen and validate the direct binding targets of HPD. Additionally, siRNA-mediated gene knockdown was performed to clarify the functional role of the identified target in DR pathology.
In vitro and in vivo experiments demonstrated that HPD significantly inhibited pathological angiogenesis and restored retinal thickness in diabetic retinopathy (DR) model mice. Proteomics analysis, coupled with surface plasmon resonance (SPR) validation, revealed that HPD directly and exclusively bound to PARK7. Furthermore, knockdown of PARK7 exacerbated pathological angiogenesis, whereas intervention with HPD markedly reversed this phenotypic alteration.
HPD directly targets PARK7 to attenuate diabetic retinopathy by suppressing pathological angiogenesis, preserving retinal structure, and maintaining blood-retinal barrier integrity.
papers.title_ko: 천연 파이토케미컬 유래 N-(4-하이드록시페네틸)-(4E)-데세나미드가 PARK7을 통해 혈관신생을 억제하여 당뇨망막병증을 개선한다

summary.question: HPD가 당뇨망막병증에서 치료 효과를 보이는지와 그 분자기전이 무엇인지 평가했다.
summary.methods: HPD를 합성해 세포 및 동물의 당뇨망막병증 모델에서 항혈관신생 효과를 보고, 단백질체 분석·분자도킹·SPR 및 siRNA knockdown으로 표적과 기능을 검증했다.
summary.results: HPD는 병적 혈관신생을 억제하고 망막 두께와 혈액-망막장벽 관련 구조를 보존했으며, 직접 표적은 PARK7로 확인되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 Anacyclus 유래 화합물이 당뇨망막병증의 병적 혈관신생을 줄일 가능성을 시사하지만, 임상 적용 가능성은 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 세포 및 동물실험 중심의 기전 연구로, 사람 대상 임상 유효성과 안전성은 명확하지 않다.

pico.p: 당뇨망막병증 모델
pico.o: 병적 혈관신생, 망막 두께, 혈액-망막장벽
