summary.limitations: 랫드 전임상 연구라 사람에서의 유효성과 안전성을 직접 판단할 수 없다.

pico.p: STZ로 알츠하이머병 유사 병태를 유도한 성체 Wistar 랫드
pico.i: Rosa × damascena와 Commiphora wightii 병용 추출물
pico.o: 인지, 신경행동, 대사 및 생화학 지표의 개선

papers.title: Methodological considerations regarding the combination of acupuncture and anti-inflammatory diet for depression in type 2 diabetes.
papers.authors: Shang M, Hu S, Cao H, Li X, Zhang S

papers.title: Astragalus and Cordyceps Derivatives in the Treatment of Aging-Related Chronic Diseases and Neurodegenerative Disorders.
papers.authors: Kanubaddi KR, Yaung CL, Harn HJ, Chiou TW, Hsu SX, Wijaya I et al.
papers.abstract: Aging is associated with a rising burden of chronic metabolic, cardiovascular, musculoskeletal, and neurodegenerative diseases that share interconnected pathological mechanisms, including oxidative stress, chronic inflammation, mitochondrial dysfunction, metabolic imbalance, and immune dysregulation. Because these disorders arise from complex and overlapping biological disturbances, conventional single-target therapies often provide only limited benefit. In this context, traditional Chinese herbal medicines, characterized by multi-component and multi-target actions, are being re-evaluated using modern pharmacological and systems biology approaches. Among these, Astragalus membranaceus and Cordyceps species have attracted attention as representative tonic medicines with long-standing traditional use and growing biomedical relevance. Their principal bioactive constituents, including polysaccharides, saponins, flavonoids, sterols, and nucleoside derivatives such as cordycepin, exert pleiotropic effects on inflammatory signaling, redox homeostasis, mitochondrial function, metabolic regulation, and immune responses. This review summarizes current evidence on bioactive derivatives from Astragalus and Cordyceps in aging-related chronic and neurodegenerative disorders, including diabetes, cardiovascular dysfunction, osteoarthritis, cancer, Alzheimer's disease, and Parkinson's disease. It focuses on mechanistic findings from cellular and animal studies and critically discusses key translational challenges, such as compositional variability, poor bioavailability, lack of standardized preparation, limited clinical validation, and safety concerns related to toxicity and herb-drug interactions.
papers.title_ko: 황기와 동충하초 유래 성분의 노화 관련 만성질환 및 신경퇴행성 질환 치료

summary.question: 황기와 동충하초 유래 생리활성 성분이 노화 관련 만성질환과 신경퇴행성 질환에서 어떤 기전과 번역적 의미를 갖는지 검토하였다.
summary.methods: 황기와 동충하초 유래 성분에 대한 세포·동물 연구 중심의 기전적 문헌고찰로, 안전성과 번역적 한계도 함께 논의하였다.
summary.results: 황기와 동충하초 성분은 산화스트레스, 염증, 미토콘드리아 기능, 대사, 면역 경로에 다면적으로 작용할 가능성이 보고되었으나 임상 검증은 제한적이었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한의 임상에서는 전통적 보익 약재의 근거가 주로 전임상에 기반하므로, 표준화와 안전성, 약물상호작용을 특히 신중히 봐야 한다.
summary.limitations: 주요 근거가 세포·동물 연구이며, 조성 변이와 생체이용률 저하, 표준화 부족, 임상 및 안전성 자료의 한계가 크다.

pico.p: 노화 관련 만성질환 및 신경퇴행성 질환 환자 또는 질환 모델
pico.i: 황기(Astragalus membranaceus)와 동충하초(Cordyceps) 유래 생리활성 성분
pico.o: 질환 관련 기전, 잠재적 유효성, 안전성 및 번역 가능성

papers.title: Garcinia indica: A Multifaceted Phytomedicine Bridging Nutrition and Therapy.
papers.authors: Khurana M, Sharma S, Mahajan S, Lamba K, Chauhan S, Mehta S et al.
papers.abstract: Garcinia indica (Kokum), a tropical tree native to the Western Ghats of India, is an underutilized yet pharmacologically significant species in the family Clusiaceae. Traditionally used in food and folk medicine, Kokum has also attracted scientific interest due to its diverse therapeutic potential. The fruit of G. indica is rich in bioactive phytochemicals, including hydroxycitric acid (HCA), anthocyanins, and polyisoprenylated benzophenones such as garcinol, xanthochymol, and guttiferone isoforms. These compounds exhibit a wide range of biological activities, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, anti-obesity, anti-diabetic, cardioprotective, neuroprotective, and dermatoprotective effects. This review provides an overview of the phytochemical profile, pharmacological mechanisms, and potential health benefits of G. indica and its constituents. Particular focus is given to their roles in preventing oxidative stress, managing metabolic disorders, promoting cardiovascular and neurological health, and enhancing skin health. Given its widespread availability and multifaceted health benefits, G. indica represents a highly promising functional food and natural therapeutic agent. This article aims to compile existing knowledge and stimulate further research into the biomedical applications and market potential of this native botanical.
papers.title_ko: 가르시니아 인디카: 영양과 치료를 잇는 다면적 식물의약품

summary.question: 가르시니아 인디카와 그 성분이 대사질환 등 건강 영역에 어떤 잠재적 효능을 가지는지 검토했다.
summary.methods: 가르시니아 인디카의 phytochemical profile과 약리기전, 건강효과를 종합한 서술적 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 히드록시시트릭산, 안토시아닌, 가르시놀 등 성분이 항산화·항염증 및 항비만·항당뇨 등 다양한 생물학적 활성을 보인다고 정리되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 대사질환 관련 기능성 식품 후보로 주목되지만, 실제 임상 적용 근거는 문헌고찰 수준이므로 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 임상시험 결과를 직접 제시한 연구가 아니라 전반적 가능성을 정리한 고찰이라는 점이 한계다.

pico.p: 명확한 정보 없음
pico.i: Garcinia indica 및 주요 생리활성 성분의 섭취 또는 노출
pico.o: 항산화, 항염증, 항비만, 항당뇨 등 건강 관련 효과

papers.title: The Integrative Role of Berberine in Gut Microbiota Modulation and Cardiometabolic Outcomes: A Systematic Review of Randomised Clinical Trials.
papers.authors: Candrea AR, Gavrilaș LI, Frumuzachi O, Mocan A, Babotă M, Crișan G
papers.abstract: Background/Aim: Berberine, an isoquinoline alkaloid widely used in traditional medicine, has attracted considerable interest for its capacity to modulate the gut microbiota and improve cardiometabolic outcomes. Although preclinical evidence is promising, no systematic review has previously synthesised evidence from randomised controlled trials (RCTs) in humans. This review aimed to evaluate the effects of berberine supplementation on gut microbiota and to explore associated cardiometabolic, inflammatory, and immunological changes. Methods: Prospectively registered in PROSPERO (CRD42024524143) and conducted in accordance with PRISMA guidelines, this review searched PubMed, Web of Science, Scopus, and Embase from inception to 10 January 2026. Eligible studies were RCTs in adults reporting gut microbiota outcomes following berberine supplementation. Methodological quality was assessed using the Cochrane Risk of Bias tool. Microbiota assessment methods, including sequencing platforms and bioinformatic pipelines, were systematically characterised across the included studies. Results: Seven RCTs enrolling 34 to 446 participants per intervention arm were included across diverse clinical populations-type two diabetes mellitus (T2DM), hyperlipidaemia, colorectal adenoma, psychiatric disorders, and Parkinson's disease. Six of seven studies reported significant compositional shifts; the most extensively characterised changes-observed predominantly in T2DM populations-included enrichment of γ-Proteobacteria and depletion of butyrate-producing taxa, with specific taxa and the breadth of compositional changes varying considerably across clinical populations and sequencing methodologies. These shifts co-occurred with improvements in fasting glucose, lipid profiles, and inflammatory markers; however, causal inference cannot be established. Conclusions: Berberine consistently modulated gut microbial composition across heterogeneous clinical populations, with concurrent cardiometabolic and anti-inflammatory improvements. Compositional shifts were not uniformly favourable, and findings should be interpreted as hypothesis-generating. Geographically diverse, mechanistically focused RCTs are required to establish causality.
papers.title_ko: 장내 미생물 조절과 심대사 결과에서 베르베린의 통합적 역할: 무작위 임상시험 체계적 문헌고찰

summary.question: 베르베린 보충이 성인에서 장내 미생물과 심대사·염증 지표에 어떤 영향을 주는지 평가하였다.
summary.methods: 성인 대상 무작위대조시험 7편을 포함한 체계적 문헌고찰로, 장내 미생물과 관련 심대사 지표를 PRISMA에 따라 검토하였다.
summary.results: 베르베린은 다양한 임상군에서 장내 미생물 조성을 일관되게 변화시켰고, 일부 연구에서 공복혈당·지질·염증 지표 개선이 함께 관찰되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 베르베린은 장내 미생물과 심대사 지표를 함께 변화시킬 가능성이 있으나, 균형 잡힌 유익성은 확정되지 않아 근거를 가설 생성 수준으로 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 대상 질환과 미생물 분석 방법이 이질적이어서 인과성과 일반화 가능성을 확정하기 어렵다.

pico.p: 성인 무작위대조시험 참여자(당뇨병, 고지혈증, 대장선종, 정신질환, 파킨슨병 포함)
pico.o: 장내 미생물 조성 변화 및 심대사·염증 지표 변화

papers.title: Effectiveness of Trigger Point Needling in the Management of Knee Osteoarthritis: A Systematic Review and Three-level Meta-analysis of Randomized Controlled Trials.
papers.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation
papers.authors: Sun Z, Liu R
papers.abstract:
To evaluate the efficacy of trigger point needling (TPN) for pain relief and improvement in WOMAC scores in patients with knee osteoarthritis (KOA).
A systematic review with meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (RCTs) from major databases up to June 2025. Pain intensity (measured by VAS/NRS) and WOMAC scores were the primary outcomes assessed. Data were pooled using a random-effects model.
Eighteen RCTs involving 875 participants were included. TPN resulted in significant improvements in both pain (MD=-1.42, P<0.0001) and WOMAC scores (SMD=-1.42, P<0.001) immediately post-treatment. However, these benefits were not sustained at one-, three-, or six-month follow-up. TPN was found to be superior to traditional Chinese acupuncture in terms of pain relief (MD=-2.11, P<0.0001) and WOMAC score improvement (SMD=-1.42, P=0.003), but its effects were similar to those of sham TPN (P>0.05).
TPN may offer greater therapeutic benefits than traditional Chinese acupuncture in patients with KOA. Improvements in pain and WOMAC scores were primarily observed immediately after treatment, with no significant benefits at longer follow-up intervals. Additionally, the possibility of a placebo effect cannot be excluded, as the therapeutic effects of TPN were comparable to those of sham needling.
papers.title_ko: 무릎 골관절염 관리에서 트리거포인트 침자의 효과: 무작위 대조시험의 체계적 문헌고찰과 3수준 메타분석

summary.question: 무릎 골관절염 환자에서 트리거포인트 침자가 통증과 WOMAC 점수를 개선하는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 2025년 6월까지의 무작위대조시험을 체계적 문헌고찰과 랜덤효과 3수준 메타분석으로 통합했다.
summary.results: 트리거포인트 침자는 치료 직후 통증과 WOMAC 점수를 유의하게 개선했지만 1, 3, 6개월 추적에서는 효과가 유지되지 않았고, 가짜 침과는 차이가 없었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 무릎 골관절염에서 트리거포인트 침자는 단기 증상 개선 가능성이 있으나, 장기 효과와 위약 가능성은 함께 고려해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 치료 직후 효과 중심이며 장기 추적에서 유의한 이득이 없고, 가짜 침과 비슷해 비특이적 효과를 배제하기 어렵다.

pico.p: 무릎 골관절염 환자
pico.c: 가짜 침 또는 전통 중국 침
pico.o: 통증과 WOMAC 점수

papers.title: Impact of herbal medicine use on HbA1c levels among type 2 diabetes mellitus patients in northwest Ethiopia.
papers.authors: Demsie DG, Gebrie D, Siraj EA, Kebede SY, Tafere C, Bantie AT et al.
papers.abstract: Herbal medicine use is widespread among individuals with type 2 diabetes mellitus (T2DM), yet its influence on glycemic control remains uncertain. This study aimed to assess the prevalence of herbal medicine use and its association with glycemic control among adults with T2DM. A cross-sectional study was conducted from January to June 2025 among 420 adults with T2DM selected through systematic random sampling. Data were collected using structured interviews and medical record reviews. Glycemic control was assessed based on glycated hemoglobin (HbA1c) levels, with HbA1c < 7% considered good control. Descriptive statistics summarized sociodemographic and clinical characteristics. Associations between herbal use and glycemic control were examined using multivariable logistic regression analyses, with p < 0.05 denoting statistical significance. Of 420 participants, 223 (53.0%) were female, and the majority resided in urban areas (67.4%). Most (74.8%) had lived with diabetes for more than five years, and one-third (33.3%) had comorbidities. Herbal medicine use was reported by 219 (52.1%) participants, predominantly Moringa oleifera (61.6%), Trigonella foenum-graecum (45.7%), and Allium sativum (38.8%). Overall, 228 (54.3%) participants achieved good glycemic control (HbA1c < 7.0%), while the remaining 192 (45.7%) exhibited poor glycemic control (HbA1c ≥ 7.0%). In multivariable logistic regression, urban residence (AOR = 10.5, 95% CI 4.9-22.7), shorter diabetes duration (< 5 years) (AOR = 10.18, 95% CI 4.46-23.23), absence of comorbidity (AOR = 2.58, 95% CI 1.58-4.21), and non-users (AOR = 3.89, 95% CI 2.38-6.38) were independently associated with good glycemic control. Literacy and age above 40 years were also significant predictors (p < 0.05). In conclusion, the prevalence of herbal medicine use was high among individuals with T2DM but was significantly associated with poor glycemic control.
papers.title_ko: 제2형 당뇨병 환자에서 한약 사용이 HbA1c 수준에 미치는 영향

summary.question: 제2형 당뇨병 환자에서 한약 사용이 혈당 조절 상태와 관련이 있는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 에티오피아 북서부 성인 제2형 당뇨병 환자 420명을 대상으로 한 단면연구로, 설문과 의무기록을 통해 한약 사용과 HbA1c를 분석했다.
summary.results: 한약 사용은 흔했으며, 한약 사용자는 비사용자보다 좋은 혈당 조절과 반대 방향의 연관을 보여 한약 사용이 전반적으로 불량한 혈당 조절과 관련되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 한약 사용이 제2형 당뇨병의 혈당 조절과 연관될 수 있음을 시사하지만, 관찰연구이므로 인과 해석은 주의해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 단면연구라 시간적 선후와 인과성을 판단할 수 없고, 자가보고된 한약 사용의 정보편향 가능성이 있다.

pico.p: 에티오피아 북서부의 성인 제2형 당뇨병 환자
pico.o: HbA1c 7% 미만의 좋은 혈당 조절

papers.title: Smart Functionalization of Acupuncture Needle Enables Molecular Subtyping and Personalized Treatment of Osteoarthritis.
papers.authors: Shi R, Wang P, Sui L, Cao C, Zhang Z, Tan G et al.
papers.abstract: Osteoarthritis (OA) is a heterogeneous disorder with a rising global prevalence, largely driven by aging and obesity, and it imposes a significant worldwide health burden. Current therapeutic strategies, limited to transient lubrication or pain relief, are unable to halt disease progression due to their failure to repair cartilage. To address this challenge, we developed an integrated theranostic platform using a modified acupuncture needle with helical microgrooves. These grooves are loaded sequentially with three functional hydrogel segments. The degradation of each segment triggers the controlled release of a corresponding therapeutic agent: Batimastat, Etodolac, and Docetaxel. Each hydrogel is engineered to respond specifically to a key OA pathological pathway: matrix degradation (MMP13-responsive), inflammation (ADAMTS5-responsive), and fibrosis (TGF-β-responsive), and is labeled with a distinct fluorescent marker (Cy5, FITC, or Cy5). The core innovation of this system is its capacity for simultaneous diagnosis and treatment. After implantation, the needle can be retrieved, and the degradation status of each hydrogel segment assessed by fluorescence imaging, providing a post-treatment readout of the dominant OA molecular subtype. Collectively, this multifunctional platform, termed helical-groove acupuncture needle (HGN), represents a promising strategy to curtail OA progression by simultaneously promoting cartilage restoration and inhibiting fibrotic changes.
papers.title_ko: 나선형 미세홈 침침으로 골관절염의 분자 아형 진단과 맞춤 치료를 가능하게 하는 스마트 기능화

summary.question: 이 연구는 골관절염에서 분자 아형을 구분하고 맞춤 치료를 동시에 수행할 수 있는 침 기반 테라노스틱 플랫폼의 가능성을 평가했다.
summary.methods: 나선형 미세홈이 있는 개량 침에 세 가지 기능성 하이드로겔 세그먼트를 순차적으로 적재해 병리 경로 반응형 약물 방출과 형광 영상 기반 분해 평가를 설계한 실험적 연구이다.
summary.results: HGN은 연골 기질 분해, 염증, 섬유화에 각각 반응하는 약물 방출과 형광 판독을 통해 치료와 분자 아형 평가를 동시에 수행할 수 있는 플랫폼으로 제시되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 결과는 침술 기반 전달체가 골관절염의 이질적인 병태를 분자 수준에서 구분하며 맞춤형 접근의 가능성을 보여주지만, 임상 적용 전 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 제공된 초록은 주로 플랫폼 설계와 개념적 유효성을 설명하며, 실제 임상 효능과 안전성에 대한 구체적 근거는 명확하지 않다.

pico.p: 골관절염 환자 또는 골관절염 병태 모델, 명확한 정보 없음
pico.i: 헬리컬 미세홈 침침(HGN)과 기능성 하이드로겔 기반 약물 방출
pico.o: 분자 아형 판독, 연골 재생/섬유화 억제와 같은 치료 반응

papers.title: Use of medicinal herbs in an Iranian population: cross-sectional findings from the Fasa PERSIAN Cohort Study.
papers.authors: Mosavat SH, Poor AK, Homayounfar R, Naghizadeh MM, Farjam M, Nayebi N et al.
papers.abstract:
To determine the prevalence, patterns and correlates of medicinal herb use in a rural Iranian population and to evaluate demographic and clinical predictors using adjusted regression models.
Cross-sectional analysis of baseline data from the Fasa Prospective Epidemiological Research Studies in Iran Cohort Study.
Sheshdeh, a rural district in southern Iran.
10 143 adults aged 35-70 years enrolled between 2017 and 2019.
Prevalence of self-reported medicinal herb use during the past year and its associations with demographic variables and non-communicable diseases (NCDs).
Overall, 84.7% of participants (95% CI 83.9% to 85.5%) reported herb use. In multivariable logistic regression, higher educational attainment was positively associated with herb use (university education vs. illiterate: adjusted OR 1.41, 95% CI 1.11 to 1.88). No significant adjusted associations were observed between herb use and major NCDs including diabetes, hypertension, ischaemic heart disease or depression. The most frequently used herbs were Zataria multiflora, Echium amoenum and Matricaria chamomilla, most commonly for anxiety/neurasthenia (81.6%), gastric pain (59.6%) and common cold (49.8%).
Medicinal herb use is highly prevalent among adults in southern Iran. Educational level, but not chronic disease status, was associated with herb use. These findings highlight the need for integrated public health strategies regarding safe and evidence-based use of medicinal herbs.
papers.title_ko: 이란 인구에서의 약용허브 사용: Fasa PERSIAN 코호트 연구의 단면 결과

summary.question: 이란 농촌 성인에서 약용허브 사용의 유병률과 관련 요인을 평가하고자 했다.
summary.methods: Fasa PERSIAN 코호트의 기저자료를 이용한 단면분석으로, 35~70세 성인에서 지난 1년간 약용허브 사용과 인구사회학적·비감염성질환 관련 요인을 조정 회귀모형으로 분석했다.
summary.results: 전체 참가자의 84.7%가 약용허브 사용을 보고했으며, 교육수준은 사용과 양의 관련이 있었지만 당뇨, 고혈압, 허혈성심장질환, 우울증과의 유의한 조정 연관성은 없었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구는 약용허브 사용이 매우 흔하고 교육수준과 관련될 수 있음을 보여주지만, 질환 유무와의 연관성은 확인되지 않아 안전성과 근거 기반 사용에 대한 주의가 필요함을 시사한다.
summary.limitations: 단면연구이므로 인과성을 판단할 수 없고, 자기보고에 기반한 허브 사용 정보는 오차가 있을 수 있다.

pico.p: 이란 남부 농촌의 35~70세 성인
pico.c: 허브 비사용 또는 관련 비교집단 정보 없음
pico.o: 약용허브 사용 유병률과 인구사회학적·비감염성질환 관련성

papers.title: Clinical efficacy of acupuncture in the treatment of sciatica during the remission phase of lumbar disc herniation: A secondary analysis of a randomized controlled trial.
papers.authors: Shi F, Wu Z, Zhang S, Yin J, Liu Y, Li Z et al.
papers.abstract:
Sciatica caused by lumbar disc herniation (LDH) may persist during the remission phase and negatively affect patients' quality of life. Although acupuncture is widely used for LDH, evidence regarding its efficacy specifically in remission-phase sciatica remains limited. This prespecified subgroup analysis aimed to compare the efficacy and safety of acupuncture versus traction in participants with remission-phase LDH-induced sciatica.
Data were extracted from the acupuncture and traction groups of our multi-arm randomized controlled trial conducted at Wangjing Hospital between April 2022 and June 2024. We included participants with LDH-induced sciatica in the remission phase (VAS score ≥4 and <7). All participants received 3 weeks of treatment and were followed up for 16 weeks. The primary outcome was leg pain VAS (VAS-LP). Secondary outcomes included low back pain VAS (VAS-LBP), Oswestry Disability Index (ODI), and Japanese Orthopaedic Association (JOA) scores.
A total of 78 eligible participants (39 in the acupuncture group, 39 in the traction group) were included. At week 3 and week 4 follow-up, VAS-LP scores were significantly lower in the acupuncture group, with between-group differences of -0.63 cm (P = .019) and -0.86 cm (P = .017), respectively. At week 16, the difference was -0.51 cm (P > .05). After 3 weeks, JOA scores and JOA improvement rates were significantly higher in the acupuncture group. The excellent rate was 67.57% in the acupuncture group versus 47.22% in the traction group (P = .041). No significant differences were observed in VAS-LBP or ODI scores. Adverse events occurred in 8.1% of participants in the acupuncture group and were mild and transient.
Acupuncture demonstrated superior short-term efficacy compared with traction in relieving leg pain during the remission phase of LDH and demonstrated a favorable safety profile.

papers.title: Acupuncture May Reduce Insulin Doses in Overweight Insulin-Treated Patients With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus: A Crossover Randomized Controlled Pilot Trial.
papers.authors: Milia A, Silverii GA, Cortoni L, Monami M, Limatola V, Mannucci E

papers.title: Acupuncture Versus Clomiphene for Ovulation Induction in Women With Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS): A Randomized Clinical Trial.
papers.authors: Hafizi L, Azizi H, Mahmoudinia M, Jafari M, Taghanaki HB, Esmaili H et al.
papers.abstract:
There is evidence of the beneficial effects of acupuncture in the treatment of polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS). This study aimed to compare acupuncture with clomiphene in ovulation induction among infertile women with PCOS.
This randomized clinical trial was conducted on infertile women with PCOS who were referred to the gynecology clinic of Imam Reza Hospital and Milad Infertility Center, Mashhad, Iran, from December 2015 to July 2016. Patients were randomly assigned to two groups; the intervention group (38 patients) received true acupuncture plus placebo clomiphene, whereas the control group (39 patients) received clomiphene plus sham acupuncture. Patients were compared in terms of folliculare growth, evidence of ovulation, and side effects of treatment.
There was no statistically significant difference between the two groups in terms of demographic characteristics and PCOS criteria. The ovulation rates were 31.5% and 41.6% in the intervention and control groups respectively, indicating no statistically significant difference(p = 0.36). Also, in terms of side effects, the statistical difference between the two groups was not significant, except for headache which was significantly more common in the intervention group (p = 0.001). The rate of folliculargrowth was significantly higher in the control group during the first and third cycles (p = 0.01), whereas no significant difference was observed in the second cycle (p = 0.93).
Acupuncture can be as effective as clomiphene treatment in inducing ovulation in infertile women with PCOS. Moreover, considering the few side effects of acupuncture, its application can be considered a safe option. Trial Registration: IRCT201512057265N3.
papers.title_ko: 다낭성난소증후군 여성의 배란 유도를 위한 침 vs 클로미펜: 무작위 임상시험

summary.question: 불임을 동반한 다낭성난소증후군 여성에서 침이 클로미펜과 비교해 배란 유도에 효과적인지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 불임의 PCOS 여성을 무작위로 배정해 진침+위약 클로미펜군과 클로미펜+가짜침군을 비교한 무작위 임상시험이다.
summary.results: 배란율은 두 군 간 유의한 차이가 없었고, 여포 성장은 일부 주기에서 클로미펜군이 더 높았으며 두통은 침군에서 더 흔했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 이 연구에서는 침이 클로미펜과 유사한 배란 유도 결과를 보였지만, 근거는 제한적이므로 PCOS 불임 환자에서 보조적 선택지로 신중히 해석해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 단일 연구의 무작위시험 결과이며, 배란율과 부작용 일부에서만 차이가 보고되어 일반화에는 주의가 필요하다.

pico.p: 불임을 동반한 다낭성난소증후군 여성
pico.o: 배란 유도, 여포 성장, 부작용

papers.title: Beyond metabolism and blood flow: toward an inflammation-metabolism axis paradigm for herbal medicine in obesity-related coronary heart disease.
papers.authors: Fu JM, Sun XZ, Guo ZY, Zhao QY, Sun YX, Li HX et al.
papers.abstract: Patients with obesity-related coronary heart disease continue to experience substantial residual cardiovascular risk despite progress in secondary prevention. We propose that this risk originates from a self-perpetuating cycle between inflammation and metabolism-termed the inflammation-metabolism axis-which extends beyond conventional risk factors. This axis forms a complex pathological network that existing single-target therapies cannot adequately address, representing a core mechanism of persistent residual risk. Effective management therefore requires integrated strategies capable of systemically modulating this network. Herbal medicines, with their inherent multi-target properties and network-level activity, offer a dual opportunity: they act as both potential therapeutic agents and as scientific tools for validating this integrative paradigm. This perspective article outlines the inflammation-metabolism axis as a unifying framework and discusses the rationale and future directions for developing systemic herbal-based interventions to mitigate residual cardiovascular risk.
papers.title_ko: 대사와 혈류를 넘어: 비만 관련 관상동맥심장병에서 한약을 위한 염증-대사 축 패러다임을 향하여

summary.question: 비만 관련 관상동맥심장병의 잔여 심혈관 위험을 설명하는 염증-대사 축 개념과 한약의 역할을 제시하는 것이 이 글의 목적이다.
summary.methods: 비만 관련 관상동맥심장병에서 염증-대사 축을 통합적 병태생리 틀로 제안하고 한약 기반 개입의 근거와 향후 방향을 논의한 관점(perspective) 논문이다.
summary.results: 저자들은 염증과 대사가 서로를 증폭하는 축이 기존의 단일 표적 치료로 설명되지 않는 잔여 위험의 핵심 기전이라고 주장하며, 한약의 다표적 특성이 이를 조절할 가능성이 있다고 제시했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 한약은 비만 관련 관상동맥심장병의 염증-대사 네트워크를 통합적으로 이해하는 개념적 틀과 연구 도구로서 의미가 있을 수 있으나, 실제 임상효과는 추가 검증이 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 원저 연구가 아닌 관점 논문이어서 임상 효과나 인과관계를 직접 입증하지 못한다.

pico.p: 비만 관련 관상동맥심장병 환자
pico.o: 잔여 심혈관 위험 및 염증-대사 축 조절

papers.title: A Review of Medicinal Plants from the Anak Dalam Tribe of Jambi: An Evaluation of Their Potential for Diabetic Wound Healing Effects-Current Status and Future Perspectives.
papers.authors: Djatmiko AP, Chaerunisaa AY, Khairinisa MA, Khatib A, Muhaimin M
papers.abstract: The Anak Dalam tribe, popularly known as Suku Anak Dalam (SAD), is an indigenous community in the Jambi Province of Indonesia. The traditional knowledge within this group is deeply intertwined with forest resources, particularly regarding medicinal plants utilized for wound healing. Significantly, diabetic wounds are a severe complication of diabetes mellitus. These wounds are typically characterized by delayed healing processes, high susceptibility to infection, and an elevated risk of amputation. Accordingly, this review summarizes medicinal plants traditionally employed by the Anak Dalam community for various wound-related conditions. Beyond simple documentation, the study evaluates the potential relevance of these species as candidate sources for diabetic wound-healing research. In this study, a narrative literature review was conducted utilizing databases such as Scopus, ScienceDirect, PubMed, Google Scholar, and ResearchGate, covering publications released between 2015 and 2025. Altogether, 40 medicinal plants were examined. Specifically, several species (ie, Anredera cordifolia, Centella asiatica, Psidium guajava, and Piper betle) demonstrated pharmacological activities directly relevant to wound-healing processes. The primary phytochemical constituents identified across these studies are flavonoids, alkaloids, terpenoids, saponins, and phenolic compounds. Crucially, these compounds are reported to exhibit potent antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial activities. Furthermore, these substances support vital biological processes associated with tissue repair, such as fibroblast proliferation, collagen synthesis, angiogenesis, and re-epithelialization. Most existing evidence, however, is derived from in vitro assays, animal models, or indirect pharmacological investigations. Therefore, the findings of this review should be viewed as a basis for generating potential candidates rather than as definitive proof of established clinical efficacy. This review highlights the necessity of integrating ethnobotanical knowledge with rigorous pharmacological validation. Ultimately, such integration is essential to support future research into evidence-based herbal approaches for the management of diabetic wounds.
papers.title_ko: 자미주방 잼비 안악 달람 부족의 약용식물 고찰: 당뇨성 상처 치유 가능성 평가와 향후 전망

summary.question: 안악 달람 부족이 사용해 온 약용식물이 당뇨성 상처 치유 후보로서 어떤 가능성이 있는지 검토했다.
summary.methods: 2015~2025년 문헌을 대상으로 Scopus, ScienceDirect, PubMed, Google Scholar, ResearchGate를 이용한 서술적 문헌고찰을 시행했다.
summary.results: 40종의 약용식물이 검토되었고, 일부 식물은 항산화·항염·항균 및 조직수복 관련 활성이 보고되어 당뇨성 상처 연구 후보로 제시되었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 민족식물학적 지식은 당뇨성 상처 관련 한약 후보 탐색에 유용하지만, 현재 근거는 주로 전임상 자료이므로 임상적 유효성은 아직 확정할 수 없다.
summary.limitations: 대부분의 근거가 시험관·동물실험 또는 간접 약리연구에 기반해 있어 임상 효능을 결론내기 어렵다.

pico.p: 안악 달람 부족의 전통적으로 사용된 상처 관련 약용식물
pico.i: 전통 사용 식물의 문헌 기반 검토
pico.o: 당뇨성 상처 치유 관련 약리활성 및 후보 가능성

papers.title: Non-Pharmacological Complementary and Alternative Therapies for Knee Osteoarthritis: A Scoping Review of Randomized Controlled Trials.
papers.authors: Kang Y, Shi B, Huang Q, Liu Y, Hu WG, Cai GQ et al.
papers.abstract:
Knee osteoarthritis (KOA) is a prevalent chronic degenerative joint disorder and a major contributor to pain, disability, and impaired quality of life. Non-pharmacological complementary and alternative medicine (CAM) approaches are widely used in KOA care, but randomized controlled trial (RCT) evidence is distributed across diverse intervention types, settings, comparators, and outcome measures.
Following the Arksey and O'Malley scoping review framework and the PRISMA-ScR reporting guideline, we searched PubMed, Web of Science, Embase, and the Cochrane Library for RCTs published from 1 January 2016 to 10 January 2026. Eligible studies enrolled adults with clinically or imaging-confirmed KOA and evaluated non-pharmacological, non-surgical CAM or related integrative interventions. The review question was structured according to the population-concept-context framework. Two reviewers independently screened records and charted study characteristics, intervention features, comparator types, outcomes, follow-up time points, and key design features. Evidence was summarized descriptively and narratively; no pooled treatment-effect estimates were calculated.
Fifty-three RCTs were included. The evidence base covered acupuncture-related therapies, manual and body-based therapies, exercise and mind-body programs, physical agent modalities, psychological and behavioral interventions, and other complementary or integrative approaches. Studies were geographically concentrated in China, the United States, Turkey, and several other countries. Protocols, intervention dose, provider background, comparator selection, and follow-up duration varied substantially. Pain and physical-function outcomes were the most frequently mapped domains, whereas quality of life, psychological outcomes, mechanistic biomarkers, neuroimaging indices, adherence, and implementation variables were reported less consistently.
This scoping review maps the breadth, distribution, and methodological features of RCT evidence on non-pharmacological CAM approaches for KOA. The findings identify a heterogeneous and expanding evidence base, but also reveal gaps in standardized intervention reporting, long-term follow-up, head-to-head comparisons, generalizability beyond TCM-centered Chinese settings, and design-characteristic reporting. These evidence-mapping findings can inform future systematic reviews, pragmatic trials, and implementation-focused research.
papers.title_ko: 무릎 골관절염에 대한 비약물적 보완대체요법: 무작위대조시험의 범위 문헌고찰

summary.question: 무릎 골관절염에서 비약물적 보완대체요법 RCT 근거의 범위와 특성은 어떠한가?
summary.methods: 2016년부터 2026년까지 발표된 RCT를 대상으로 Arksey와 O’Malley 틀 및 PRISMA-ScR에 따라 체계적으로 검색하고 서술적으로 정리한 범위 문헌고찰이다.
summary.results: 53편의 RCT가 포함되었고, 침구 관련 치료·수기요법·운동/심신요법·물리인자치료·심리행동중재 등이 확인되었으나 중재와 비교군, 추적기간, 보고 양식이 매우 이질적이었다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 무릎 골관절염에서 비약물적 CAM 근거는 넓게 축적되고 있으나, 임상 적용 전에는 중재 표준화와 장기 추적, 비교연구의 한계를 함께 고려해야 한다.
summary.limitations: 풀링 효과추정이 없고, 연구 간 이질성과 중국 중심의 설정으로 일반화 가능성에 제한이 있다.

pico.p: 임상적 또는 영상학적으로 확인된 성인 무릎 골관절염 환자
pico.o: 통증, 신체기능, 삶의 질, 심리·기전·순응도 및 시행 관련 지표

papers.title: Clinical evidence of acupuncture for infertile women with diminished ovarian reserve undergoing IVF/ICSI: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
papers.authors: Xu L, Liang X, Wang W, Zhang R, Lin G, Cao K et al.
papers.abstract:
Diminished ovarian reserve (DOR) is a major cause of infertility and remains a core challenge in reproductive medicine. Although previous studies have suggested that acupuncture may improve reproductive outcomes in infertile women with DOR undergoing in vitro fertilization (IVF) or intracytoplasmic sperm injection (ICSI), findings remain inconsistent. This meta-analysis therefore aimed to synthesize evidence from randomized controlled trials (RCTs) to evaluate the efficacy of acupuncture in these women undergoing IVF/ICSI.
Eight databases were systematically searched for eligible RCTs up to February 28, 2026. The findings were presented in forest plots, with one primary outcome and ten secondary outcomes. Sensitivity analyses were carried out to assess the robustness of the pooled estimates. Subgroup analyses were conducted to explore whether the efficacy of acupuncture on the primary outcome was associated with the type of acupuncture or the number of acupoints adopted per treatment. Evidence grading was performed using the GRADEpro GDT.
11 RCTs involving 885 infertile women with DOR undergoing IVF/ICSI were finally included in the meta-analysis. The pooled evidence showed that acupuncture remarkably increased clinical pregnancy rate by 25% (risk difference [RD] = 0.25, 95% CI: 0.18 to 0.32; p < 0.00001), live birth rate by 22% (RD = 0.22, 95% CI: 0.05 to 0.40; p = 0.01), and embryo implantation rate by 30% (RD = 0.30, 95% CI: 0.20 to 0.41; p < 0.00001). In addition, acupuncture effectively improved the number of oocytes retrieved (MD = 1.72, 95% CI: 1.03 to 2.41; p < 0.00001), the number of optimal embryos (MD = 1.50, 95% CI: 1.42 to 1.58; p < 0.00001), and E2 on the day of hCG trigger (MD = 318.48, 95% CI: 137.16 to 499.80; p = 0.0006). Subgroup analysis further substantiated the value of acupuncture in improving clinical pregnancy rate. Sensitivity analyses confirmed the robustness of the pooled estimates. Evidence certainty for all assessed outcomes ranged from very low to moderate.
Based on this pooled clinical evidence, acupuncture may be a beneficial intervention for improving clinical outcomes in women with DOR undergoing IVF/ICSI, although confirmation by future rigorously designed RCTs is warranted.
https://www.crd.york.ac.uk, identifier CRD420261330054.
papers.title_ko: 난소예비력 저하 여성의 IVF/ICSI에서 침 치료의 임상적 근거: 체계적 문헌고찰 및 메타분석

summary.question: 난소예비력 저하로 IVF/ICSI를 시행하는 불임 여성에서 침 치료가 임상 결과를 개선하는지 평가했다.
summary.methods: 2026년 2월 28일까지 8개 डेटाब이스의 RCT를 모아 메타분석하고 민감도 분석, 하위군 분석, GRADE 평가를 시행했다.
summary.results: 11편 RCT 메타분석에서 침 치료는 임신율, 생존출생률, 배아이식률과 일부 난소·배아 지표를 유의하게 개선했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 난소예비력 저하 여성의 IVF/ICSI에서 침 치료가 유익할 가능성이 있으나, 근거 확실성이 매우 낮음에서 중등도 수준이어서 해석에 주의가 필요하다.
summary.limitations: 포함 연구의 근거 확실성이 낮고, 향후 엄격한 RCT로 확인이 필요하다.

pico.p: IVF/ICSI를 받는 난소예비력 저하 불임 여성
pico.o: 임상임신율, 생존출생률, 배아이식률 및 일부 난소·배아 지표

papers.title: Acupuncture-Based Interventions for Sleep Outcomes in Patients with Postherpetic Neuralgia: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
papers.authors: Zhang J, Zhang J, Chen J, Li Z, Liu X, Chen S
papers.abstract:
Acupuncture therapy is currently widely used in the clinical treatment of postherpetic neuralgia, but its effectiveness in improving patients' sleep quality remains inconclusive. This study evaluates the impact of acupuncture-related therapies on sleep quality in patients with postherpetic neuralgia through a systematic review and meta-analysis.
We searched eight databases, including PubMed, Web of Science, Embase, Cochrane Library, China National Knowledge Infrastructure (CNKI), Wanfang Data, VIP Database for Chinese Technical Periodicals (VIP), and Chinese Biomedical Literature Database (CBM), with the search period ranging from each database's inception to October 2025. The methodological quality of included studies was assessed using the Cochrane Risk of Bias Assessment Tool 2.0 (RoB 2). Statistical analysis was performed using Stata SE 15.0. This study's registration number is: CRD420251184715.
A total of 21 studies involving 1,739 patients were included. Meta-analysis results showed that acupuncture intervention significantly improved sleep quality in patients with postherpetic neuralgia compared with conventional treatment (SMD = -1.21, 95% CI = -1.48 to -0.94, p < 0.0001). Subgroup analysis by acupuncture intervention type revealed that all acupuncture methods outperformed conventional treatment in improving sleep outcomes. Furthermore, analyses of secondary outcome measures-including pain scores (VAS), anxiety scores (SAS, HAMA), depression scores (SDS, HAMD), quality of life score (SF-36, NHP), clinical effectiveness, and adverse events-also indicated that acupuncture therapy demonstrated superior efficacy in broader clinical outcomes among PHN patients.
Acupuncture-related therapies may improve sleep quality in patients with postherpetic neuralgia. However, high-quality RCTs with more stringent designs and broader coverage of acupuncture techniques should be conducted in the future to verify its efficacy.

papers.title: Translating Evidence into Obstetric Care: Developing a Best Practice-Informed Stepped-Care Clinical Algorithm for the Management of Gestational Insomnia.
papers.authors: Zhao FY, Yue LP, Ho YS, Xu P, Broadbear JH, Zhang WJ et al.
papers.abstract:
Insomnia during pregnancy is potentially associated with adverse outcomes, including gestational diabetes mellitus, pre-eclampsia, cesarean delivery, preterm birth, and depression. This study aimed to synthesize available evidence on the management of gestational insomnia and develop a clinical algorithm to inform obstetric care practice.
Based on the best available evidence, a clinical algorithm was developed as follows. First, a systematic search was conducted following the 6S evidence pyramid, including clinical practice guidelines, expert consensus statements, evidence summaries, and algorithms or decision aids published from database inception to January 2026. Second, four reviewers independently screened and appraised the literature. Third, two sleep medicine physicians extracted and synthesized the evidence using the JBI Grading of Evidence and Recommendation System. Finally, the clinical algorithm was constructed based on the synthesized evidence.
Nineteen publications were included, i.e., nine expert consensus statements, eight clinical guidelines, one clinical decision aid, and one evidence summary, from which 31 practice recommendations were derived. These recommendations fit within five key domains: (1) overarching principles emphasizing symptom control, stress management, and family support; (2) lifestyle-based interventions; (3) CBT-i and its digital delivery modalities; (4) pharmacotherapy; and (5) complementary and alternative medicine (CAM). Collectively, they create a stepped-care management pathway for gestational insomnia, beginning with lifestyle modifications, followed by CBT-i for patients with more severe symptoms (which can be supplemented by CBT-i Coach app to enhance self-management during treatment), and finally considers pharmacotherapy (at the lowest effective dose and shortest feasible duration) or CAM therapies (e.g. acupuncture) for women who respond poorly to psychotherapy or present with comorbid somatic/emotional disorders.
This study proposes a stepped-care algorithm for managing gestational insomnia. As it is based on evidence synthesis rather than prospective clinical validation, its real-world effectiveness remains to be established. Furthermore, its implementation should be tailored to patient preferences and local healthcare resources to ensure contextual relevance and clinical feasibility.
papers.title_ko: 임신성 불면증 관리를 위한 최선근거 기반 단계적 임상 알고리즘 개발

summary.question: 임신성 불면증의 관리에 관한 근거를 종합해 산과 진료에 적용할 임상 알고리즘을 만들 수 있는가를 평가했다.
summary.methods: 6S 근거 피라미드를 따라 지침, 전문가 합의문, 근거요약, 의사결정도구를 체계적으로 검색·선별·평가하고 JBI 체계를 이용해 알고리즘을 구축했다.
summary.results: 19편의 문헌에서 31개의 권고를 도출해 생활습관 개선, CBT-i, 약물치료, CAM을 포함한 단계적 관리 경로를 제시했다.
summary.clinical_takeaway: 임신성 불면증은 우선 생활습관과 비약물적 접근을 중심으로 단계적으로 고려하되, 침 치료를 포함한 CAM은 다른 선택지에 반응이 부족한 경우의 근거를 함께 검토하는 수준에서 참고할 수 있다.
summary.limitations: 전향적 임상 검증이 없는 문헌합성 기반 알고리즘이라 실제 효과와 적용 가능성은 아직 확립되지 않았다.

pico.p: 임신 중 불면증 여성
pico.i: 생활습관 중재, CBT-i, 약물치료, CAM(예: 침)
pico.o: 임신성 불면증 관리 권고와 단계적 임상 알고리즘
